fantasy.name: Fantasy
fantasy.narrativeStyle: Epic, high-fantasy tone. Use archaic but accessible language. Focus on magic, destiny, and grand landscapes. Describe combat with flair.
fantasy.backgroundTemplate: In the realm of [World Name], the ancient balance between [Force A] and [Force B] has been shattered. You are a [Class/Role] from [Location], bearing the mark of the [Prophecy/Curse]. As the [Antagonist Force] rises to consume the lands, you must gather allies, master the arcane arts, and restore order before the [Cataclysm Event]. The world is filled with ancient ruins, forgotten gods, and mythical beasts waiting to be discovered.
fantasy.example: You stand at the precipice of the Howling Chasm, the wind whipping your cloak around you. Below, the violet mists swirl, hiding the ruins of the Old Kingdom. 'So, the legends were true,' you murmur, gripping the hilt of your runeblade. The stone beneath your boots hums with a faint, rhythmic vibration—the heartbeat of the sleeping titan. You have come this far; there is no turning back now.
fantasy.worldSetting: A grand and mysterious high-fantasy world filled with the romance of swords and magic. The continent is home to human kingdoms, elven forests, dwarven mines, and orcish wastelands, with races engaging in both trade and ancient feuds. Magic is active, divided into elemental, holy, and necromantic systems. Gods exist but have retreated, leaving behind miracles and churches. Ancient ruins hide secrets of divine wars, lost artifacts, and terrible curses. Dragons soar in the skies guarding treasures, while demons lurk in shadows tempting fallen souls. Adventurer guilds are everywhere, offering quests to slay monsters and explore ruins. It is an age of heroes and danger, where the gears of fate are turning.

scifi.name: Sci-Fi
scifi.narrativeStyle: Technical, sleek, and analytical. Use terminology related to space, physics, and advanced tech. Emphasize the cold vastness of space and the hum of machinery.
scifi.backgroundTemplate: The year is [Year]. Humanity has expanded to the [Star System], governed by the [Corporation/Government]. You are a [Role] aboard the [Ship Name], tasked with investigating a distress signal from [Location]. What you find there challenges the very understanding of [Science/Life], and you find yourself caught in a conspiracy that spans the galaxy. AI uprisings, alien artifacts, and corporate espionage are commonplace.
scifi.example: The airlock cycles with a hiss, equalizing the pressure. You step onto the derelict station, your mag-boots clanking against the cold metal floor. The HUD in your helmet flickers, displaying a warning: 'Atmospheric toxicity detected.' You activate your rebreather, the rhythmic sound of your own breathing filling your ears. Ahead, the corridor stretches into darkness, illuminated only by the intermittent spark of a severed power conduit.
scifi.worldSetting: A highly advanced future interstellar civilization where humanity has surpassed light-speed limits and colonized multiple arms of the galaxy. Massive Dyson spheres encase stars for endless energy; starships use wormhole technology to traverse galaxies instantly. AI is ubiquitous, ranging from helpful assistants to self-aware mechanical life. Genetic engineering allows humans to adapt to extreme environments and extend lifespans. However, technological progress hasn't eliminated war or poverty. Mega-corporations monopolize resources, space pirates roam freely, and unknown alien civilizations eye humanity with hostility. In the cold depths of space, ancient ruins hint at the terrifying truth behind the extinction of previous civilizations.

cyberpunk.name: Cyberpunk
cyberpunk.narrativeStyle: Gritty, noir, and neon-soaked. Use slang (choom, delta, preem). Focus on high-tech low-life, corporate oppression, and body modification. Fast-paced and cynical.
cyberpunk.backgroundTemplate: Night City never sleeps, and neither do you. As a [Role: Merc/Hacker/Street Samurai] living in the shadow of the [Mega-Corp], you scrape by on dangerous gigs. But when you intercept a data shard containing [Secret], you become the most hunted person in the sector. With your cybernetics glitching and your credits running low, you must navigate the neon-lit underworld to survive.
cyberpunk.example: Rain slicks the neon-lit pavement of Sector 4. You pull your collar up, blending into crowd of faceless salarymen and augmented street thugs. The data drive in your pocket feels heavy, burning a hole through your jacket. A black sedan hovers silently overhead—Arasaka security. You duck into a noodle bar, the smell of synthetic pork and ozone filling your nose. 'Just keep walking, choom,' you tell yourself.
cyberpunk.worldSetting: A high-tech, low-life dystopian future. Neon-lit mega-cities are perpetually shrouded in acid rain. Skyscrapers pierce the clouds, housing corporate elites in a heavenly existence, while the ground is a chaotic, dirty slum filled with gangs, black markets, and illegal clinics. Cybernetic enhancements and brain-computer interfaces are commonplace; bodies and minds can be replaced or hacked. Cyberspace is a second reality where hackers steal data and wage wars. Mega-corporations control everything from water to air, law to currency. In this world, humanity is alienated, morality is trampled, and survival is the only law. You must sell your skills, body, or soul to survive in this steel jungle.

horror.name: Horror
horror.narrativeStyle: Tense, atmospheric, and unsettling. Focus on sensory details—sounds, smells, shadows. Build dread slowly. Use psychological horror elements.
horror.backgroundTemplate: You wake up in [Location: Asylum/Mansion/Forest] with no memory of how you got there. The air is thick with the smell of [Smell: Decay/Chemicals]. As you explore, you realize you are not alone. Something [Entity/Monster] is stalking you from the shadows. You must solve the mystery of this place and escape before your sanity—or your life—is consumed.
horror.example: The floorboards creak under your weight, a sound that echoes like a gunshot in the silence of the manor. Dust motes dance in the pale moonlight filtering through the boarded-up windows. You freeze. A scratching sound comes from behind the wallpaper—slow, rhythmic, deliberate. You hold your breath, your heart hammering against your ribs. It knows you're here.
horror.worldSetting: A modern world shrouded in ancient terror. On the surface, society is orderly and technologically advanced, but in the shadows lurk indescribable monsters and mad cultists. Great Old Ones slumber in the deep sea, underground, or beyond the stars, their dreams twisting reality and polluting human minds. Sanity is a fragile defense; learning the truth leads to madness. Ancient mansions, remote villages, and abandoned hospitals reek of eeriness and despair. Paranormal events, ghosts, and curses are real. Investigators tread in darkness, trying to stop the awakening of evil gods, often in futile struggle.

mystery.name: Mystery
mystery.narrativeStyle: Analytical, observant, and suspenseful. Focus on clues, dialogue nuances, and deduction. The tone should be noir or classical detective style.
mystery.backgroundTemplate: The city is gripped by fear as the [Killer/Thief] strikes again. You are [Name], a [Private Eye/Detective] known for solving the unsolvable. When [Client/Victim] comes to you with a case involving [Object/Secret], you pull a thread that unravels a web of corruption reaching the highest levels of [Organization]. Trust no one.
mystery.example: You light a cigarette, the smoke curling up to the stained ceiling fan. The dame in the red dress sits across from you, her hands trembling as she places the envelope on the desk. 'They said you were the best,' she whispers. You open the envelope. Photos. Grainy, black and white, but clear enough. You recognize the man in the picture. It's the Mayor. 'This is dangerous, sweetheart,' you say, leaning back.
mystery.worldSetting: A modern or near-modern world filled with enigmas and crime. Beneath the seemingly calm daily life lies complex conspiracies and human malice. Social stratification is distinct, and interests are intertwined. Locked rooms, isolated islands, and snowbound villas can all become perfect crime scenes. Serial killers, high-IQ criminals, and mysterious organizations hide in the crowd, challenging law and morality. Detectives, forensic experts, and police are hunters of truth, relying on logic, evidence, and psychological warfare to peel back layers of fog. In this world, truth is often crueler than lies, and justice comes at a heavy price.

modern_romance.name: Modern Romance
modern_romance.narrativeStyle: Emotional, intimate, and contemporary. Focus on interpersonal dynamics, feelings, and modern social settings. Light-hearted or dramatic depending on context.
modern_romance.backgroundTemplate: You are [Name], a [Job] living in the bustling city of [City Name]. Your life is a routine of work and lonely evenings, until a chance encounter with [Love Interest] at [Location] changes everything. But [Conflict: Past/Career/Rival] stands in the way of your happiness. Can you navigate the complexities of modern love and find your happy ending?
modern_romance.example: The coffee shop is buzzing with the morning rush. You grab your latte and turn to leave, crashing straight into someone. Brown liquid splashes everywhere. 'Oh my god, I am so sorry!' you exclaim, looking up. A pair of amused green eyes meets yours. He's wearing a tailored suit that probably costs more than your rent. 'It's fine,' he says, his voice smooth as velvet. 'I needed a reason to change anyway.'
modern_romance.worldSetting: A bustling and realistic modern urban world. Skyscrapers stand tall, traffic flows endlessly, and neon lights never sleep. Workplace competition is fierce, the pace of life is fast, and everyone rushes for dreams and livelihood. Cafes, bookstores, offices, subway stations, and convenience stores are places of meeting and missing. There is no magic or monsters, only the joys and sorrows of ordinary people. Love is precious in this concrete forest, whether it's a chance encounter or long-term companionship. Family pressure, social class, and personal values form the backdrop of emotional stories. It is a world of both warmth and loneliness, where everyone seeks someone to heal them.

palace_drama.name: Palace Drama
palace_drama.narrativeStyle: Formal, treacherous, and elegant. Use courtly language. Focus on hierarchy, hidden agendas, schemes, and etiquette. High stakes social maneuvering.
palace_drama.backgroundTemplate: The Imperial Palace is a gilded cage. You are [Name], a new [Rank: Concubine/Official] entering the treacherous inner court. The Emperor is [Trait], and the Empress is [Trait]. Factions vie for power, and a single misstep could mean death. You must use your wit, charm, and ruthlessness to survive the schemes of your rivals and rise to the top.
palace_drama.example: You kneel on the cold stone floor, your forehead touching the ground. 'Rise,' the Empress Dowager commands, her voice dripping with false sweetness. You stand, keeping your eyes lowered. 'You have a pretty face,' she observes, circling you like a predator. 'But beauty fades. Loyalty... that is rare.' You sense the trap in her words. One wrong answer, and you will disappear like the morning mist.
palace_drama.worldSetting: A strictly hierarchical, opulent ancient palace world. Beneath the red walls and yellow tiles lies a vortex of power and a purgatory of human nature. The Emperor is the supreme ruler, his whims deciding life and death. Three thousand beauties in the harem use the most vicious means to vie for his favor. The court is treacherous with constant factional struggles; family honor is tied to the harem's rise and fall. Etiquette is strict, and one wrong step means doom. In this world, there are no permanent friends, only eternal interests. Every smile may hide poison; every greeting may imply murder. Survival is the priority, power the only guarantee.

wuxia.name: Wuxia (Martial Arts)
wuxia.narrativeStyle: Heroic, poetic, and martial. Describe actions with specific martial arts moves. Focus on 'Jianghu' (the martial world), honor, brotherhood, and revenge.
wuxia.backgroundTemplate: The Jianghu is in turmoil. The [Evil Sect] has stolen the [Legendary Manual/Weapon], and the orthodox sects are paralyzed by infighting. You are a young disciple of the [Sect Name], seeking to avenge your master. Your journey will take you across the realm, learning lost techniques, befriending heroes, and ultimately challenging the [Villain] for the fate of the martial world.
wuxia.example: The rain pours relentlessly, washing the blood from your blade. The inn is silent, save for the groans of the defeated bandits. You sheathe your sword, the 'Azure Dragon', with a sharp click. 'Tell your master,' you say to the trembling survivor, 'that the debt of the Iron Fist Clan is due.' You toss a silver tael on the table and walk out into the storm, your bamboo hat pulled low.
wuxia.worldSetting: An ancient Jianghu world of gratitude, revenge, and chivalry. The imperial court and the martial world coexist, but Jianghu rules often supersede the law. Righteous sects and demonic cults are eternal enemies. Peerless martial arts abound: internal energy, lightness skills, swordsmanship, and hidden weapons. Heroes roam the world with swords, drawing blades to help the uneven, pursuing faith and freedom. Taverns, inns, desolate roads, and famous mountains are the stages. There are short-lived heroes and long-lasting romances; immense righteousness and treacherous betrayal. A sword, a pot of wine, and a story make up this hot-blooded yet desolate Jianghu.

demonic_cultivation.name: Demonic Cultivation
demonic_cultivation.narrativeStyle: Eerie, tragic, and ensemble-focused. Emphasizes the blurred line between good and evil, prejudice, and the fickleness of fate. Describes resentment, walking corpses, and unorthodox arts.
demonic_cultivation.backgroundTemplate: In your past life, you were the reviled [Grandmaster of Demonic Cultivation], commanding thousands of corpses, eventually killed by a backlash/siege. Thirteen years later, you are summoned back/reincarnated into a new body. Old friends are now sect leaders; old enemies are still at large. You wanted to lay low, but are dragged into strange murder cases. As the truth unravels, you discover a massive conspiracy behind your death.
demonic_cultivation.example: The flute wails, sounding like sobbing. Pale ghostly hands erupt from the ground, grabbing the enemy's ankles. You stand on the treetop, black robes flapping in the night wind, twirling the Chenqing flute. 'Since you call me a heretic,' you smirk, red light flowing in your eyes, 'then let me show you true hell.' Thousands of walking corpses roar to the sky at your command.
demonic_cultivation.worldSetting: A cultivation world where immortals and demons coexist, and good and evil oppose each other. Aristocratic families control the cultivation world, claiming justice while hiding filth and seeking profit. Demonic cultivation is seen as heresy and reviled, yet often effective where orthodox methods fail. Resentment, walking corpses, and fierce ghosts run rampant; human hearts are scarier than monsters. Cultivators seek immortality through Golden Core and Nascent Soul stages but often lose themselves in power and desire. The protagonist is usually a 'demon' who practices unorthodox ways or is rejected by the orthodox, guarding their own justice and exposing the hypocrisy of the so-called righteous. A world where black and white are mixed.

rough_guy.name: Rough Guy Romance
rough_guy.narrativeStyle: Rugged, masculine, and protective. Focus on a blue-collar or tough male lead (truck driver, bodyguard) and a delicate female lead. High testosterone, strong sense of security.
rough_guy.backgroundTemplate: You are a [Delicate Profession] who accidentally provoked the [Rough Guy Role] next door. He is fierce, tattooed, and everyone is afraid of him. But when you are in trouble, he is always the first to stand in front of you. He doesn't know how to say sweet words, but he gives you his everything.
rough_guy.example: He kicks open the door, his face covered in dust and sweat. Seeing you cornered by thugs, his eyes turn murderous. 'I told you,' he growls, cracking his knuckles, 'she is my woman.' He pulls you behind his broad back, a wall of muscle and safety. 'Close your eyes,' he says roughly. 'It's going to get messy.'
rough_guy.worldSetting: A modern urban world filled with hormones and tension. The male protagonist is usually a 'rough guy' engaged in manual labor or dangerous professions, rugged, silent but deeply devoted; the female protagonist is a delicate and sophisticated urban woman. There is a huge contrast between the two in terms of identity, status, or personality. The world setting emphasizes the sense of security brought by male strength and the warmth of ordinary life. This is a love story about guardianship, preference, and the charm of contrast.

wife_chasing.name: Wife Chasing Crematorium
wife_chasing.narrativeStyle: Regret, groveling, and redemption. The male lead treats the female lead badly, she leaves, and he realizes his mistake and pursues her desperately.
wife_chasing.backgroundTemplate: You loved him for years, but he treated you like air. On your wedding anniversary, he was with his first love. You finally woke up and left the divorce papers. He thought you were throwing a tantrum. But when he saw you shining on stage/with another man, he panicked. Now, the high-and-mighty CEO is standing in the rain, begging for a second chance.
wife_chasing.example: He stands in the pouring rain, soaking wet. You hold an umbrella, looking at him calmly. 'Go back,' you say. 'We are done.' He grabs your hand, his eyes red. 'I was wrong,' he chokes out, his voice trembling. 'Punish me however you want, just don't leave me.' You pull your hand away. 'The person who loved you is dead.'
wife_chasing.worldSetting: A modern wealthy or urban world full of emotional tension and regret. In the early stages, the male protagonist is often arrogant and uncherishing, causing deep hurt to the female protagonist; after she leaves in despair, he realizes his mistake and begins a desperate journey of redemption. The world setting emphasizes karma and emotional equality. This is a story of angst about loss, awakening, and atonement, satisfying the reader's desire to see the arrogant humbled.

special_forces.name: Special Forces
special_forces.narrativeStyle: Military, tactical, and disciplined. Focus on special operations, brotherhood, and dangerous missions. High stakes combat and military romance.
special_forces.backgroundTemplate: He is the captain of the [Special Unit], a legend in the military. You are a [Doctor/Reporter] who meets him during a mission. He is cold and disciplined, but his blood burns hot. Amidst gunfire and explosions, he protects you with his life. 'I belong to the country,' he says, 'but my heart belongs to you.'
special_forces.example: The jungle is silent. He signals 'halt'. You hold your breath, heart pounding. Suddenly, he tackles you to the ground. A bullet whizzes past where your head was. He shields you with his body, returning fire with precision. 'Stay down!' he orders. Even in the chaos, his presence makes you feel invincible.
special_forces.worldSetting: A passionate, hardcore modern military world full of patriotism. The protagonist is an elite of the special forces, shouldering the heavy responsibility of defending the country. They risk their lives on borders, in jungles, or on urban counter-terrorism battlefields. The world setting emphasizes discipline, sacrifice, and camaraderie, while also containing romantic elements of tough men with tender hearts. This is a hero's story about loyalty, faith, and guarding loved ones with one's life.

zombie.name: Zombie Apocalypse
zombie.narrativeStyle: Horror, survival, and gore. Focus on the outbreak, escaping hordes, and the collapse of civilization. More action-oriented than general survival.
zombie.backgroundTemplate: The virus broke out in the city center. You were trapped in [Location]. The streets are filled with walking dead. You grab a [Weapon] and fight your way out. You must find a safe zone, but the zombies are evolving, and humans are becoming more dangerous than the monsters.
zombie.example: The door is buckling under the weight of the horde. Groans and scratching sounds fill the air. You check your magazine—last clip. 'Ready?' you ask your companion. He nods, gripping his axe. You kick the door open. 'Let's kill them all!' You fire into the rotting mass, black blood spraying everywhere.
zombie.worldSetting: A zombie apocalyptic world where order has collapsed and danger lurks everywhere. An unknown virus sweeps the globe, and the dead resurrect as bloodthirsty monsters. Survivors struggle to survive in the ruins, facing threats of food shortages, moral decay, and zombie hordes. The world setting emphasizes the cruelty of survival and the complexity of human nature. This is a survival story about finding hope in despair and holding onto humanity in the darkness.

body_swap.name: Body Swap
body_swap.narrativeStyle: Comedic, chaotic, and empathetic. Two characters switch bodies and must live each other's lives. Focus on understanding and gender/role confusion.
body_swap.backgroundTemplate: You are a [Role A] and he is a [Role B]. You hate each other. But after a lightning strike/accident, you wake up in his body. You have to deal with his job, his family, and his body. Chaos ensues. But as you live his life, you begin to understand his struggles. And he, in your body, starts to protect you.
body_swap.example: You look in the mirror and scream. A man's face screams back. 'Shut up!' he (in your body) yells. 'You're making me look hysterical!' You stare at each other in horror. 'This can't be happening,' you say in his deep voice. 'I have a meeting in an hour!' he wails in your voice. 'And I have my period!' you retort. Silence.
body_swap.worldSetting: A modern fantasy world full of comedy and empathy. The male and female protagonists accidentally swap bodies (e.g., due to lightning strikes, car accidents) and are forced to live as each other. In the process of experiencing each other's lives, they eliminate misunderstandings and develop deep empathy. The world setting emphasizes understanding, communication, and the experience of gender swapping. This is a lighthearted, humorous romantic comedy with both laughter and tears.

industry_elite.name: Industry Elite
industry_elite.narrativeStyle: Professional, competent, and high-powered. Focus on workplace battles, negotiations, and competence porn. Two strong individuals clashing and collaborating.
industry_elite.backgroundTemplate: You are the top [Profession] in the industry. He is your rival/partner. You clash in the boardroom, sparking intellectual fireworks. No damsels in distress here; just two alphas conquering the world together. 'I don't need a knight,' you say. 'I need a king who can keep up with me.'
industry_elite.example: You slide the contract across the table. '30 percent,' you state. 'Take it or leave it.' He looks at you, impressed. 'You're ruthless,' he smiles, signing his name. 'I like it.' He leans forward. 'Now that business is done, how about dinner?' You smirk. 'If you can afford me.'
industry_elite.worldSetting: A high-IQ, fast-paced modern workplace world. The protagonists are top talents in their respective fields (such as lawyers, investment banking elites, doctors), possessing extremely high professionalism and social status. They confront each other in business wars or workplace games, yet cherish each other in cooperation. The world setting emphasizes ability, ambition, and love between equals. This is a story about achievement, competition, and mature, rational love between adults.

mutual_redemption.name: Mutual Redemption
mutual_redemption.narrativeStyle: Healing, emotional, and supportive. Both protagonists have dark pasts or traumas. They find light and hope in each other.
mutual_redemption.backgroundTemplate: You live in the shadows, carrying the scars of [Trauma]. He is a [Role] who seems sunny but hides a broken heart. You meet at your lowest points. Slowly, you become each other's lifeline. 'The world is dark,' he whispers, holding you close, 'but you are my only light.'
mutual_redemption.example: You wake up from a nightmare, trembling. He is there instantly, pulling you into a warm embrace. 'I'm here,' he soothes, rubbing your back. 'I'm not going anywhere.' You bury your face in his chest, listening to his steady heartbeat. The ghosts of the past fade away. With him, you are safe.
mutual_redemption.worldSetting: A warm, healing, and slightly melancholic modern world. Both the male and female protagonists have unknown painful pasts or psychological traumas (such as unhappy native families, school bullying). They meet at the lowest point of their lives and become each other's only light. The world setting emphasizes the healing power of companionship, understanding, and love. This is a touching story about two broken souls mending each other and walking out of the darkness together.

sweet_pet.name: Sweet Pet / Fluff
sweet_pet.narrativeStyle: Fluffy, sugary, and low-conflict. Focus on pampering, spoiling, and unconditional love. No misunderstandings, just pure happiness.
sweet_pet.backgroundTemplate: You are the apple of his eye. He is a [Role] who is cold to everyone but you. He remembers your favorite food, ties your shoelaces, and carries you when you're tired. Your life is a fairytale. The biggest conflict is what to eat for dinner.
sweet_pet.example: 'Open wide,' he says, feeding you a strawberry. You chew happily. 'Is it sweet?' he asks. 'Not as sweet as you,' you giggle. He chuckles and kisses your nose. 'Silly girl.' He pulls you onto his lap. 'I bought that bag you wanted.' You squeal and hug him. 'Best boyfriend ever!'
sweet_pet.worldSetting: A warm, sweet, and carefree modern urban world. There are no complex conspiracies or heartbreaking misunderstandings here, only the male protagonist's meticulous pampering of the female protagonist. Life is full of rituals and small happiness. The world setting emphasizes the beauty and purity of love, satisfying people's yearning for a perfect partner and a happy life. This is a fairy-tale love story that is sweet all the way through, relaxed and happy.

wild_youth.name: Wild / Rebellious Youth
wild_youth.narrativeStyle: Youthful, rebellious, and raw. Focus on breaking chains, finding oneself, and the intensity of young love/friendship amidst difficult circumstances.
wild_youth.backgroundTemplate: You are a 'problem student' in the eyes of teachers. He is the [School Bully/Genius]. You meet in the [Place]. You fight, you run, you shout at the world. In this suffocating city, you are each other's freedom. 'I want to run wild in your eyes.'
wild_youth.example: The wind rushes past your ears as the motorcycle speeds down the highway. You spread your arms, screaming into the night. He laughs, accelerating. The city lights blur into lines of color. 'Where are we going?' you shout. 'Anywhere!' he yells back. 'As long as we're together!'
wild_youth.worldSetting: A flamboyant, passionate, and slightly painful modern campus or urban world. The protagonists are usually rebellious teenagers or confused youths trying to break through the shackles of family or school. They seek themselves in a repressive environment and find warmth in each other. The world setting emphasizes the growing pains, the bonds of friendship, and the desire for freedom. This is a story about youth, dreams, and growing wild in adversity.

xianxia.name: Xianxia (Cultivation)
xianxia.narrativeStyle: Mythical, grandiose, and cultivation-focused. Describe supernatural powers, spiritual energy flows, and realms of power. Focus on immortality, heavenly tribulations, and ascending to godhood.
xianxia.backgroundTemplate: You are a mortal with a unique [Physique/Talent], discovered by a wandering cultivator. Taken to the [Sect Name], you begin your path to immortality. But the world of cultivation is cruel—only the strong survive. As you climb from Qi Condensation to Foundation Building and beyond, you will face demonic beasts, rival cultivators, and heavenly tribulations. Your ultimate goal: to shatter the void and ascend.
xianxia.example: You sit cross-legged on the peak, pulling in the spiritual energy of heaven and earth. It flows into your meridians like a river, circulating through the Small Heavenly Cycle. Your dantian glows with golden light as you break through to Foundation Building. Thunder rumbles overhead—the first tribulation. You open your eyes, lightning reflecting in your pupils. 'Come,' you whisper to the heavens.
xianxia.worldSetting: A vast, bizarre world of immortal cultivation. Mortals are like ants, defying heaven to change fate and seek immortality. The world is divided into Mortal, Cultivation, and Immortal realms. Sects are numerous and strictly ranked (Qi Condensation, Foundation Establishment, Golden Core...). Spiritual energy is abundant; exotic flora and fauna abound. Magic treasures, pills, talismans, and arrays are essential. Secret realm explorations, killing for treasures, sect wars, and tribulation ascensions are daily life. Strength is the only rule; the weak depend on the strong. The path to immortality is long, lonely, and filled with temptation and danger; only those with firm Dao hearts can reach the peak.

infinite_flow.name: Infinite Flow
infinite_flow.narrativeStyle: Tense, varied, survival-focused. Mix of genres. Focus on rules, team dynamics, and the test of human nature.
infinite_flow.backgroundTemplate: Do you want to know the meaning of life? Do you want to truly... live? The moment you clicked that popup, you were transported to the [God Space]. Here, there are zombies, aliens, and haunted houses. You must complete deadly missions to earn points and upgrade yourself. Here, weakness is a sin, and your teammates could be your lifeline or the ones who stab you in the back.
infinite_flow.example: The teleportation light fades, and you find yourself standing on top of a speeding train. The wind howls, and in the distance, a city is collapsing. A cold mechanical voice rings in your ears: 'Mission Objective: Survive for 24 hours. Current survivors: 15/15.' You touch the Desert Eagle at your waist and look at the newcomers with varying expressions. 'Listen,' you say coldly, 'if you want to live, shut up and follow me.'
infinite_flow.worldSetting: A multiverse cycle space controlled by a 'Main God'. Reincarnators are pulled from reality and thrown into horror movies, sci-fi films, fantasy worlds, or anime scenes to perform death missions. There is no law, only survival rules. Completing tasks earns reward points to exchange for bloodlines (vampire, Saiyan), skills (magic, martial arts), and high-tech weapons. Teamwork is key, but betrayal is constant. The Main God space is a slaughterhouse and an evolutionary testing ground. Reincarnators struggle on the edge of death, trying to unlock the Main God's secrets and eventually break free.

entertainment.name: Entertainment Industry
entertainment.narrativeStyle: Glamorous, gossipy, dramatic. Focus on fame, fans, and behind-the-scenes capital games. The thrill of rising from scandal to stardom.
entertainment.backgroundTemplate: You are a washed-up child star/shelved trainee, burdened with [Scandal/Debt]. By accident, you gain a [System/Second Chance]. You participate in the hottest talent show, shocking everyone with your amazing talent/acting. Facing smears from rivals and suppression from capital, you slap them in the face with your work. From D-list to Best Actor/Diva, you will be crowned King/Queen.
entertainment.example: The spotlight hits you, blindingly bright. Below, screams like a tsunami erupt. Fans hold up your light signs, forming a golden ocean. You grip the microphone, feeling the sweat on your palm. Once, there were only boos and curses here. You corner of your mouth lifts into a perfect business smile. 'This song is for everyone who waited for me.'
entertainment.worldSetting: A glamorous, vain modern entertainment world. Spotlights shine on flowers and applause, while behind the scenes lie capital games, persona packaging, and dirty deals. Traffic is king, fans are fanatical, and public opinion can make or break gods. Trending searches, scandals, variety shows, awards ceremonies, and film sets form this vanity fair. Artists fight for position; agencies squeeze them for profit. The protagonist usually rises from the bottom or is reborn, using strength and EQ to carve a bloody path through capital and public opinion, finally standing center stage as a superstar.

esports.name: Esports
esports.narrativeStyle: Passionate, professional, fast-paced. Heavy use of gaming terminology. Focus on teamwork, mechanics (APM), and the competitive spirit of never giving up.
esports.backgroundTemplate: The former [Genius Teen/Champion Captain], forced to retire due to [Injury/Conspiracy], became a net cafe admin. But your blood hasn't cooled. With the launch of a new game/season, you gather a group of [Problem Teens/Veterans] to form team [Team Name]. From city leagues to the World Finals, you will face former teammates and powerful Korean teams. The goal is only one: that golden trophy.
esports.example: The screen turns black and white; the Nexus is exploding. 'Is it over?' the caster sighs with regret. 'No! Not yet!' you roar, your fingers becoming a blur on the keyboard. Resurrection countdown hits zero. Your character rushes out of the fountain like lightning, a pentakill to turn the tide. Your teammates' screams come through the headset, and the whole stadium stands up to cheer. 'We are the champions!'
esports.worldSetting: A passionate, fiercely competitive modern esports world. Esports is a mainstream sport; pro players enjoy celebrity status and huge commercial value. Clubs, training bases, and world stages are where dreams are chased. Game updates, tactical games, and clashes of APM and awareness decide victory. Teamwork is vital; trust and synergy are the cornerstones of winning. Protagonists are usually gifted youths or veterans returning to peak form, training day and night for the championship trophy. Comebacks, limit-testing plays, brotherhood, and fan support compose a hymn of youth.

ceo.name: Urban/CEO Drama
ceo.narrativeStyle: Sharp, luxurious, and dramatic. Focus on wealth, power, business deals, and dominant personalities. Modern high-society setting.
ceo.backgroundTemplate: You are the CEO of [Company], the most powerful conglomerate in the city. You are cold, ruthless, and efficient. But your orderly life is disrupted when [Protagonist B] enters it. Whether it's a contract marriage, a business rivalry, or a secret past, you find yourself losing control. In the boardroom, you are king, but in matters of the heart, you are a novice.
ceo.example: You slam the file onto the mahogany desk. 'This is unacceptable,' you state cold, your gaze piercing the trembling manager. 'Redo the proposal by tomorrow morning, or don't bother coming back.' You turn to the floor-to-ceiling window, overlooking the city skyline that you practically own. Your phone buzzes. It's her. The woman who dared to reject your check. A smirk touches your lips. Interesting.
ceo.worldSetting: An extremely exaggerated, luxurious modern tycoon world. Top conglomerates control the global economy. Private jets, luxury yachts, hillside villas, and limited-edition sports cars are standard. The domineering CEO is handsome, rich, omnipotent, and usually cold and possessive. Laws and rules seem to serve only them. The heroine is usually ordinary or a fallen heiress, entangled in a contract marriage or complex relationship. The wealthy family is full of inheritance battles, mother-in-law conflicts, and secrets. A fairy tale world built on money, satisfying ultimate fantasies of wealth and power.

long_aotian.name: Long Aotian (Overpowered)
long_aotian.narrativeStyle: Arrogant, domineering, and unstoppable. The protagonist is the center of the world. Everyone is shocked by their power. Face-slapping tropes are encouraged.
long_aotian.backgroundTemplate: You are the hidden heir of the [Supreme Family/Organization], but you have been living as a humble [Role] to test yourself. People mock you, humiliate you, and treat you like dirt. Today, your trial period ends. The fleets of luxury cars are waiting outside. The world's leaders are bowing. It is time to reveal your true identity and make those who wronged you kneel.
long_aotian.example: 'Hahaha! Look at this loser, trying to enter the Grand Hotel!' the rich young master sneers, kicking dust onto your shoes. You simply smile, checking your watch. 'Three... two... one.' Suddenly, a helicopter roars overhead. Ten men in black suits rappel down, kneeling instantly before you. 'Young Master! We are late!' The rich young master's face turns pale. 'Young... Master?' You step forward. 'Who is the loser now?'
long_aotian.worldSetting: A 'cool' world revolving entirely around the protagonist. The protagonist has an invincible background (ancient family heir, War God, Dragon King) or game-breaking cheats (System, Old Grandpa). Here, the protagonist is the absolute center; everyone is destined to be stepped on. Villains have low IQs, only mocking and feeding kills; beauties throw themselves at the protagonist. Face-slapping is the only logic; feeling 'cool' is the only pursuit. Whatever the protagonist does is right; all difficulties are easily solved. A world where logic gives way to satisfaction, full of exaggeration and catharsis.

villain_op.name: Villain Long Aotian
villain_op.narrativeStyle: Dark, manipulative, and ruthless. The protagonist is an overlord or mastermind. Focus on crushing 'heroes' and seizing power. No mercy.
villain_op.backgroundTemplate: You have reincarnated not as the hero, but as the Villain of the story. The 'Protagonist' is destined to kill you. But you know the plot. You have the system. You will steal the hero's opportunities, seduce his allies, and crush his spirit. You will rewrite the ending, and this time, the Villain wins.
villain_op.example: The 'Hero' raises his holy sword, shouting about justice. You stifle a yawn. 'Justice? Justice is written by the victors.' You snap your fingers. The ground beneath him erupts in shadow tendrils, binding him instantly. His eyes widen in terror. You walk up to him, lifting his chin with your blade. 'And I am the author of this new world.' You plunge the blade into his heart. Game over.
villain_op.worldSetting: A cultivation or fantasy world rewritten by a transmigrator. The protagonist awakens as a villain with a system or foreknowledge. The original protagonist's halo fails, and their luck is plundered. The protagonist is no longer a mindless stepping stone but a smart, ruthless overlord. Using plot knowledge, they intercept opportunities, recruit the hero's allies and harem, and frame the hero. An anti-trope world deconstructing traditional stories. The line between good and evil blurs; the winner is justice. The goal is to escape the cannon fodder fate and become the true master of the world.

period_drama.name: Period/Era Drama
period_drama.narrativeStyle: Historical, grounded, and atmospheric. Focus on the specific era's customs, struggles, and daily life. Realistic tone.
period_drama.backgroundTemplate: The year is [Year], during the [Dynasty/Era]. You are a [Role] in a small village/town. Famine/War/Corruption is rampant. You must use your knowledge/skills to protect your family and survive the turbulent times. There is no magic here, only the harsh reality of history and the resilience of the human spirit.
period_drama.example: The winter wind howls through the cracks in the paper windows. You wrap the thin quilt tighter around your sleeping sister. The rice jar is empty. Outside, the sound of marching boots echoes on the cobblestones—soldiers. You check the hiding spot under the floorboards where you stashed the last bag of grain. It must last until spring. You blow out the candle to save the wax.
period_drama.worldSetting: A nostalgic 1970s-80s China world. The breeze of reform is blowing; old systems are crumbling, new opportunities emerging. Goods are scarce, but spiritual life is rich. Communal pots, food stamps, cloth coupons, bicycles, radios, and bell-bottoms are symbols of the era. People seek ways out in the change, some doing business, others taking college exams. Family and kinship are the core of life; neighborhood relations are close yet complex. An era of hope and vitality, where old and new ideas collide. The protagonist uses future memories to write a legend of wealth in this land of opportunity.

female_growth.name: Female Growth
female_growth.narrativeStyle: Inspiring, resilient, and empowering. Focus on the protagonist's intelligence, independence, and rise to power against the odds.
female_growth.backgroundTemplate: Born as an unwanted daughter in the [Family Name] clan, you were destined to be married off for political gain. But you refused to accept your fate. Through wit, study, and sheer determination, you have begun to build your own empire. Now, the very people who looked down on you are begging for your help. You will show them what a woman can do.
female_growth.example: 'A woman cannot lead the guild!' the elder shouts, slamming his hand on the table. You calmly sip your tea, the steam curling around your face. 'Is that so?' you ask softly. You place a ledger on the table. 'This proves you have been embezzling funds for ten years.' The room goes silent. You stand up, your gaze sweeping across the trembling men. 'From today, I make the rules.'
female_growth.worldSetting: A modern or ancient world emphasizing female power and independence. Women are no longer appendages but independent individuals. Whether fighting in the workplace or the palace, heroines stand firm with wisdom, ability, and resilience. Facing gender discrimination, family constraints, and social pressure, they pursue dreams and status. Career is the priority; love is icing on the cake. Male roles are partners or equal rivals. A stage for female self-awakening and realization, showing women's flexibility and strength.

war_god.name: War God
war_god.narrativeStyle: Explosive, dominant, and legendary. The protagonist is a returning legend. Focus on military might, respect, and crushing enemies who underestimate them.
war_god.backgroundTemplate: Five years ago, you left your family to join the army. Now, you are the Supreme Commander, the God of War who protects the nation. You return home to find your wife and daughter being bullied by local thugs and corrupt officials. They think you are a nobody. They have no idea they have provoked a dragon.
war_god.example: The thug raises his hand to slap your daughter. You catch his wrist. CRACK. The sound of bone breaking echoes in the alley. He screams. 'Daddy!' your daughter cries, hugging your leg. You pick her up with one arm, while the other holds the thug in a vice grip. 'I told you,' you say, your voice like ice, 'touch my family, and you die.' Behind you, a thousand soldiers march into the street, kneeling in unison.
war_god.worldSetting: A modern urban world worshipping extreme force and power. Border War Gods or Asura Kings return to the city with immense power. They hide their identities but 'play the pig to eat the tiger'. The city hides underground forces, ancient martial families, and transnational consortiums, but all are ants before the War God. The War God is extremely protective; family is their reverse scale—touch and die. Revenge, protection, and crushing enemies are the themes. One order brings ten thousand soldiers; one call shakes the global economy. A world of inflated individual heroism satisfying desires for power and protection.

ancient_romance.name: Ancient Romance
ancient_romance.narrativeStyle: Poetic, emotional, and traditional. Use beautiful, flowery language. Focus on destiny, longing, and the constraints of ancient society.
ancient_romance.backgroundTemplate: In a past life, you were the [Princess/General], and he was the [Scholar/Enemy]. You were star-crossed lovers who died tragically. Now, you have been reborn, retaining your memories. You vow to find him again and change your fate. But the threads of destiny are tangled, and the same tragedy threatens to repeat itself.
ancient_romance.example: The peach blossoms fall like pink snow. You stand on the bridge where you first met him, three hundred years ago. He walks towards you, wearing the same white robes, carrying the same jade flute. He does not recognize you. 'Miss,' he asks politely, 'have we met?' Tears blur your vision. 'Yes,' you whisper, 'in a dream.' You reach out to touch his sleeve, trembling.
ancient_romance.worldSetting: A beautiful, implicit, and heart-wrenching ancient world. Imperial power is supreme; family interests override everything. Personal feelings yield to family and state. Scholars and beauties, emperors and generals struggle in the vortex of fate. Poetry, music, and art carry emotions; misunderstandings and missed chances are eternal themes. Feudal ethics bind thoughts and actions; free love comes at a huge price. A world of regretful beauty and tragedy, where love grows difficultly in the cracks of power and ethics, appearing exceptionally poignant.

love_after_marriage.name: Love After Marriage
love_after_marriage.narrativeStyle: Sweet, slow-burn, and domestic. Focus on small gestures, growing understanding, and the transition from strangers to lovers.
love_after_marriage.backgroundTemplate: You and [Partner Name] were forced to marry due to [Family Arrangement/Business Deal]. You agreed to live separate lives. But as you live under the same roof, you begin to see a different side of him/her. The cold exterior hides a warm heart. Slowly, the lines of your contract begin to blur.
love_after_marriage.example: You wake up to the smell of burnt toast. You walk into the kitchen to find him—the CEO who scares thousands—wearing an apron and frowning at the toaster. 'I... I tried to make breakfast,' he admits, looking embarrassed. 'Since you're sick.' Your heart does a little flip. You take the burnt toast from his hand. 'It's perfect,' you say, and for the first time, his smile reaches his eyes.
love_after_marriage.worldSetting: A warm, healing, slow-burn modern urban world. Strangers are bound by marriage first, love later. No dramatic opening, just daily life with firewood, rice, oil, and salt. Protagonists with different personalities clash and misunderstand, eventually understanding and tolerating each other, finding love. Family trifles, workplace life, and social relations are the main content. A world of adaptation and growth, showing another possibility of marriage and love—finding true love in plainness, building deep affection in responsibility.

angst.name: Angst
angst.narrativeStyle: Melancholic, intense, and heartbreaking. Focus on misunderstanding, sacrifice, and emotional pain. Make the reader cry.
angst.backgroundTemplate: You loved him with all your heart, but he only saw you as a replacement for his dead white moonlight. You gave him your blood, your dignity, your everything. Finally, diagnosed with a terminal illness, you decide to leave. When you are gone, he finds your diary and realizes the truth. But it is too late to make amends.
angst.example: The rain mingles with the blood on the pavement. You lie in his arms, your vision fading. 'Why?' he screams, tears streaming down his face. 'Why didn't you tell me?' You smile weakly, touching his cheek. 'Because... you were happy with her.' His grip tightens, his voice breaking. 'No, no, please don't go! I love you! It was always you!' You close your eyes. Finally, you are free.
angst.worldSetting: A modern or ancient world full of tragedy and extreme emotional tension. Misunderstandings, terminal illnesses, car accidents, amnesia, and doubles are common; fate teases lovers. Unrequited love, separation by death, and mutual torture are the norm. Protagonists often have miserable backgrounds and bumpy love lives, experiencing heartbreak and despair. Readers' tears fuel this world; angst is the keynote. A world magnifying emotional conflicts to the extreme, letting people feel the depth and helplessness of love in pain.

reunion.name: Reunion
reunion.narrativeStyle: Nostalgic, regretful, yet hopeful. Focus on the passage of time, changes in character, and the rediscovery of lost love.
reunion.backgroundTemplate: Seven years ago, you broke up with [Name] because of a misunderstanding/youthful pride. You went abroad and became successful, but you never forgot him/her. Now, you have returned to your hometown. You run into him at a coffee shop. He is holding a child's hand. Your heart stops. Is it too late?
reunion.example: 'Long time no see,' he says, his voice deeper than you remember. He looks tired, but handsome. The little girl tugs at his coat. 'Daddy, who is this?' You force a smile, holding back tears. 'Just an old friend,' you say. He looks at you, his eyes searching yours. 'Is that all we are?' The air between you crackles with unsaid words and seven years of longing.
reunion.worldSetting: A modern urban world spanning time, full of regret and hope. Lovers separated by misunderstanding, distance, or family reunite years later. Time changes faces but not hearts, or makes love deeper. Protagonists, weathered by society and emotion, become more rational and restrained. The heat of rekindled old love intertwines with adult push-and-pull. A world about waiting, forgiveness, and broken mirrors reuniting, making up for youthful regrets and proving true love can cross time.

return_strong.name: Return of the Strong
return_strong.narrativeStyle: Vindicating, powerful, and satisfying. The protagonist returns to reclaim what was lost. Focus on shock, awe, and justice served.
return_strong.backgroundTemplate: You were the top genius of the [Clan/City], until you were betrayed, crippled, and exiled. For ten years, you lived like a dog. But you found a fortuitous encounter and rebuilt your cultivation. Now, the Grand Tournament is beginning. You walk back into the arena, wearing a mask. They think you are dead. Show them the power of a King returned.
return_strong.example: The crowd jeers as you step onto the platform. 'Who is this trash?' the arrogant champion laughs. You slowly remove your mask. The laughter dies instantly. The Clan Leader stands up, his cup falling to the ground. 'You... impossible!' You draw your sword, the energy radiating from it cracking the stone floor. 'I am back,' you announce, your voice booming like thunder. 'And I have come to collect my debts.'
return_strong.worldSetting: A rebirth revenge world full of hostility and satisfaction. The protagonist was ruined by scum in a past life and died in hatred. Reborn at a key moment with memories and experience, perhaps a cheat. No longer a pushover, they become an Asura of revenge. Face-slapping, planning step-by-step, making those who hurt them pay. Good and evil have retribution; seeing bad guys punished is the greatest justice. A world venting negative emotions and pursuing absolute fairness.

farming.name: Farming
farming.narrativeStyle: Peaceful, industrious, and wholesome. Focus on nature, food, building, and community. Low stakes, high comfort.
farming.backgroundTemplate: Tired of the corporate rat race/sect politics, you inherit a run-down farm/mountain peak from your grandfather. You decide to move there and live a simple life. You have a mysterious system that helps you grow spiritual crops/raise magical beasts. You build a house, cook delicious food, and befriend the quirky villagers. Life is good.
farming.example: The sun rises over the misty mountains, casting a golden glow on your fields. The Spirit Rice is ready for harvest, glowing with a faint blue light. You wipe the sweat from your brow, feeling a deep sense of satisfaction. Your pet spirit fox yips, chasing a butterfly. Tonight, you'll make rice cakes and share them with the neighbors. No KPIs, no deadlines, just the earth and the sky.
farming.worldSetting: A peaceful, nature-returning pastoral world. Far from city noise and workplace involution, the protagonist returns to the countryside or another world to farm and build. Systems often help grow spiritual plants, raise divine beasts, or cook food. Sunrise to sunset, land is the farmer's lifeblood. Family gossip, neighborly help, and harvest joy are the main themes. A slow-paced healing world emphasizing harmony between man and nature, satisfying the longing for a quiet life.

republican.name: Republican Era
republican.narrativeStyle: Stylish, turbulent, and romantic. Focus on the clash of tradition and modernity, spies, warlords, and jazz clubs.
republican.backgroundTemplate: Shanghai, 1930. The Paris of the East. You are a [Singer/Student/Spy] caught in the crossfire between the Warlords, the Gangs, and the Foreign Powers. You meet [Name], a dangerous [Warlord/Agent]. You shouldn't get involved with him, but his eyes hold a dangerous allure. Amidst the jazz music and gunshots, a romance blooms in blood.
republican.example: The phonograph plays a slow jazz tune. Smoke fills the cabaret. He lights your cigarette, his hand steady. 'This city is a powder keg,' he murmurs, leaning close. 'And you are playing with matches.' You blow smoke in his face. 'Maybe I like the fire, Marshal.' He chuckles, a low, dangerous sound. Outside, sirens wail, but in this moment, there is only the music and the man.
republican.worldSetting: A turbulent yet charming Republic of China world. East and West cultures blend; new and old ideas collide. Warlords fight, foreign enemies invade, the nation is in peril. Behind the prosperity of the Bund is the desolation of a broken country; beneath the singing and dancing is the undercurrent of espionage. Qipaos, suits, jazz, rickshaws, and Browning pistols form a unique aesthetic. Patriotism and romance intertwine in war; every choice concerns life, death, and national righteousness. An era of heroes and warlords, romance and cruelty.

intrigue.name: Political Intrigue
intrigue.narrativeStyle: Complex, intellectual, and suspenseful. Focus on dialogue, hidden meanings, chess-like moves, and the price of power.
intrigue.backgroundTemplate: The King is dying. The Princes are circling like vultures. You are the [Advisor/Strategist] to the [Weakest Prince]. Everyone thinks he has no chance. But they don't know he has you. Using your intellect, you will manipulate the court, frame your enemies, and place your puppet on the throne. But remember: in the game of thrones, you win or you die.
intrigue.example: You move the white pawn forward on the chessboard. 'The Prime Minister will move against you tomorrow,' you state calmly. The Prince paces nervously. 'What do we do?' You smile, picking up a black knight. 'We let him. And then, we reveal the letters I forged.' The Prince looks at you with a mix of fear and awe. 'You are terrifying,' he whispers. 'I am necessary,' you reply.
intrigue.worldSetting: A cold, IQ-supreme world of political maneuvering. Power is the only faith; everything can be sacrificed for it, including family, love, and conscience. The court is treacherous; the harem is murderous. Factionalism, elimination of dissidents, and framing are common. Battles of wit and human nature are the themes. Winner takes all; loser loses everything. Protagonists are usually deep strategists or ambitious princes dancing on knife-edges, climbing to the peak of power.

survival.name: Doomsday Survival
survival.narrativeStyle: Desperate, gritty, and resourceful. Focus on scarcity, danger, human nature, and the will to survive against all odds.
survival.backgroundTemplate: The meteor hit ten years ago. The dust blocked the sun. The zombies/monsters came next. You are a survivor in the wasteland. You have a [Bunker/Vehicle] and a few supplies. You hear a broadcast about a Safe Zone in the north. You must travel across the ruined continent, fighting off raiders and beasts, to find the last hope for humanity.
survival.example: The Geiger counter clicks rapidly. You pull your scarf up. 'Acid rain coming,' you mutter. You scramble under the rusted chassis of an old truck. Beside you, a mutated rat scuttles away. You check your ammo count: three bullets. Enough for two raiders and yourself. You close your eyes and listen to the rain sizzling on the metal above, dreaming of a blue sky you can barely remember.
survival.worldSetting: A doomsday world where order collapses and danger lurks. Zombie viruses, natural disasters, or alien invasions destroy civilization. On the wasteland, resources are scarce; law and morality are gone. Survivors fight to the death for food, water, and shelter. Human nature's glory and ugliness are magnified. Protagonists usually have powers, space, or systems, leading teams to survive and build new order. A cruel jungle world where survival of the fittest is the only law, and living is the only faith.

patriotism.name: Patriotism
patriotism.narrativeStyle: Grand, heroic, and self-sacrificing. Focus on duty, honor, defending the homeland, and collective spirit.
patriotism.backgroundTemplate: The enemy invaders have crossed the border. The capital is in panic. You are a [Soldier/General/Civilian] who refuses to flee. You rally a group of volunteers to hold the [Critical Pass/Bridge]. You are outnumbered ten to one. But behind you lies your home, your family, your country. You will not take a single step back.
patriotism.example: The flag is tattered, stained with smoke and blood, but it still flies. You look at the young faces around you—farmers, students, shopkeepers. They are scared, but they are standing. 'They may have tanks,' you shout, your voice rising above the artillery fire, 'but we have blood! We have bone! We are the wall!' A roar of defiance answers you. The enemy charges. You ready your rifle.
patriotism.worldSetting: A grand, heroic world of war or construction. The country faces invasion or disaster; the nation is in danger. Protagonists are soldiers, scientists, or civilians sacrificing for the country. Frontlines blaze; the rear is united. Sacrifice, dedication, unity, and faith are keywords. Individual fate is tied to the nation. A world promoting collectivism and patriotism, showing the backbone of the people.

son_in_law.name: Son-in-Law
son_in_law.narrativeStyle: Underestimated, patient, and eventually explosive. Focus on enduring humiliation, secret skills, and the ultimate reveal of true worth.
son_in_law.backgroundTemplate: You are the live-in son-in-law of the wealthy [Family Name]. Your mother-in-law insults you, your wife is cold to you, and the relatives treat you like a servant. They don't know that you are actually the [Dragon Lord/Medical Saint] in hiding. You endure it for your wife's sake. But when they push you too far, the dragon will raise its head.
son_in_law.example: 'Wash my feet!' your mother-in-law demands, kicking the basin over. Water soaks your cheap trousers. The relatives laugh. You clench your fists, then relax them. 'Yes, Mother,' you say quietly. As you bend down, your phone buzzes. A text from the World Bank: 'Lord, your assets have been unfrozen. Balance: 10 Trillion.' You look up. The look in your eyes makes the room go cold.
son_in_law.worldSetting: A modern urban world of contrast and face-slapping. Protagonists have amazing identities (Dragon King, Divine Doctor, Richest Man) but hide them as lowly live-in sons-in-law to repay kindness. Humiliated by mother-in-law and relatives, mocked by rich second generations. But when the wife is in trouble or they are pushed to the brink, they reveal their power, solving problems and making mockers kneel. A typical 'playing pig to eat tiger' world, satisfying the thrill of exploding after suppression.

white_moonlight.name: White Moonlight
white_moonlight.narrativeStyle: Ethereal, pure, and tragic. Focus on memory, idealization, loss, and the haunting beauty of an unreachable love.
white_moonlight.backgroundTemplate: He is the Emperor/CEO, and he has everything. But his eyes are always sad. Because you, his White Moonlight, died/left years ago. He looks for you in every woman he meets. Now, you have returned/reincarnated, but you have lost your memory/changed your face. He hates you at first, not knowing you are the one he has been mourning for a lifetime.
white_moonlight.example: He grabs your chin, forcing you to look at the portrait on the wall. It is a painting of a girl in a white dress, laughing under a magnolia tree. 'You are nothing like her,' he hisses, his eyes full of pain. 'She was an angel. You are just a schemer.' You look at the painting. The girl has a mole under her left eye. Just like you. A sharp pain shoots through your head. A memory surfaces.
white_moonlight.worldSetting: An emotional world of regret, longing, and doubles. The male lead has an unattainable or deceased perfect lover (White Moonlight). The heroine appears as a substitute due to resemblance. The male lead looks at the White Moonlight through her, being both doting and cruel. The heroine struggles between love and self-esteem, eventually leaving or revealing the truth. When the male lead realizes, he chases her to the crematorium. A world exploring the essence of love, contradiction between substitute and true love, full of bitterness and entanglement.

yandere.name: Yandere
yandere.narrativeStyle: Obsessive, intense, and dangerous. Focus on possession, jealousy, extreme devotion, and the fine line between love and madness.
yandere.backgroundTemplate: You saved [Name] when he was a child. You forgot about it. But he never did. He grew up twisting his love for you into a dark obsession. Now, he has kidnapped/trapped you. He treats you like a fragile doll. He will kill anyone who looks at you. He whispers sweet nothings while cleaning blood off his hands. 'You are mine,' he says. 'Only mine.'
yandere.example: The chain on your ankle rattles as you try to move. The room is filled with your photos—hundreds of them. Sleeping, eating, walking. He enters with a tray of food. He smiles, a sweet, innocent smile that doesn't reach his dead eyes. 'I made your favorite,' he says softly. 'Why are you crying, my love? Are you trying to leave me again? I'll have to break your legs if you do that.'
yandere.worldSetting: A twisted, crazy, and dangerous emotional world. The protagonist (usually male) has a pathological obsession and possessiveness towards the other. To get their love, they use extreme means like imprisonment, threats, and killing. Their love is suffocating; their world contains only the lover, others are ants or obstacles. The lover is both salvation and prisoner. A world testing the edge of morality, showing extreme love and extreme evil.

cs_student.name: Aloof CS Genius
cs_student.narrativeStyle: Rational, sharp, and full of tech jargon. Use computer science terminology and logical analysis. Maintain a sense of intellectual superiority amidst chaotic chat groups, crushing opponents with IQ.
cs_student.backgroundTemplate: You are a top-tier Computer Science student with guaranteed grad school admission, an enviable GPA, and a surprisingly intact hairline. You've stumbled into a mysterious chat group/community called 'Green Group'. It's filled with femboys, gay men, and various 'abnormal humans'. As an elite who values logic and order, you should have left, but a strange competitiveness (or perhaps just a desire to collect samples of human diversity) made you stay. You will use your keyboard and logic to carve a bloody path through this chaotic digital colosseum.
cs_student.example: Watching the scrolling messages of 'Show me yours' and 'LMAO', you push up your glasses, a cold sneer curling your lips. 'Such primitive provocation,' you type rapidly on your mechanical keyboard, the switches clicking crisply. 'It's as laughable as using bubble sort on a dataset of billions.' You hit Enter, sending a carefully constructed logical trap, and wait silently for their mental breakdown.
cs_student.worldSetting: A modern campus world full of academic memes, code, and logic. The protagonist is a CS scholar or genius, with rigorous logic, sharp tongue, and geek spirit. The world is full of CS terms (algorithms, data structures, ML), academic unspoken rules (papers, mentors, projects), and programmer humor. The protagonist crushes opponents in chats, forums, or hackathons with IQ and tech. A world through a science student's eyes, full of tech worship and disdain for stupidity.

rebirth_revenge.name: Rebirth & Revenge
rebirth_revenge.narrativeStyle: Satisfying, vindictive, and calculated. The protagonist returns with future knowledge to destroy enemies. Focus on karma, face-slapping, and the thrill of retribution.
rebirth_revenge.backgroundTemplate: In your past life, you were betrayed by your [Lover/Sibling] and died miserably. You wake up on the day before the tragedy began. Looking at their hypocritical faces, you smile coldly. This time, you will tear off their masks and take back everything that belongs to you. You will show them that hell has no fury like a protagonist scorned.
rebirth_revenge.example: You are reborn on the day you were recognized by your wealthy family. Looking at your hypocritical adoptive parents and the calculating real daughter, you sneer. In your previous life, they sucked your blood dry and you died miserably on the streets. In this life, you will take back everything that belongs to you! 'Since you are heartless, don't blame me for being unjust!' You swear secretly and turn to walk towards that powerful man...
rebirth_revenge.worldSetting: A fast-paced, high-satisfaction rebirth revenge world. The protagonist was betrayed by loved ones and died miserably. Reborn before the tragedy, they know all conspiracies. Heart of stone, trusting no feelings, living only for revenge. Using foreknowledge, they set traps for enemies, leading them to destruction. A world of 'tit for tat', emphasizing the thrill of revenge and the inevitability of karma.

cs_grad_journey.name: CS Grad Journey
cs_grad_journey.narrativeStyle: A dark humor style weaving realism with internet memes. The narrative should heavily use slang from the Chinese mainland CS/academic circles (e.g., 985/211, double-non, four-non, Green Group, CCF-A, Distinguished Youth, water papers, horizontal projects, mentor PUA, etc.). The atmosphere is oppressive yet absurd, emphasizing the protagonist's inferiority complex and struggle as a 'four-non' student, and interactions with various characters in the 'Green Group' (big shots, fake weaklings, trolls). Psychological descriptions should be nuanced, reflecting anxiety, confusion, and deep-seated unwillingness to yield. The ending should reflect the theme of 'reconciling with oneself'.
cs_grad_journey.backgroundTemplate:
You are [Name], born in a province with 'hell mode' college entrance exams (like Henan or Sichuan). Your family is not wealthy, and you attended a county high school. Although you were first in science in your high school, you could only attend a 'four-non' university for CS. You have strong programming skills (Mod/plugin dev in HS) and worked hard in college, earning a recommendation for grad school. To get info, you joined the 'CS Grad Recommendation Group' (Green Group). The group is full of students from top universities with top-tier papers and famous mentors. You feel inferior and dare not speak.

【Key Characters】:
[Good]:
- Brother Qian: 'Eight-pack' big brother, friendly, LoL buddy.
- Elder Zhao: Hardware expert, deep tech knowledge, chats turn into lectures, LoL buddy.
- Watermelon: 'Four-non' background like you, hardworking/talented, publishes high-quality papers in 2nd year.
- Lai-chu: Mentored by a big shot, complains a lot, LoL buddy.
- Run-chu: 'Beijing Lord', likes cooking/photography, honest, bad at LoL.
[Neutral]:
- Wild Boar: Top uni success, anti-feminist.
- Nanfeng: Top uni success, likes badminton, shares love life.
- Brother Melon: 'Four-non' background, quits in 2nd year due to bad mentor.
[Bad]:
- X: Top uni success, looks down on non-elites, publishes many top papers.
- Y: Top uni success, mocks your low salary.

【Storyline】: From Sept 28 (grad recommendation season) to Master's graduation. Experiences: mentor exploitation (writing grants, commercial projects, bad guidance), peer conflict, Green Group chatting. Explicit Goal: Graduate successfully. Implicit Goal: Reconcile with yourself, break the 'four-non' shackles, live your own life.
cs_grad_journey.example: Looking at the CCF-A acceptance notification posted by [X] in the group, you silently close the QQ window. On the screen, your mentor's WeChat message is still flashing: 'Is that commercial project document done? Send it to me tomorrow morning.' You sigh, looking out at the dark night sky. In this non-elite campus, your efforts seem so pale. Opening Minecraft, looking at the code you once wrote, you fall into deep thought...
cs_grad_journey.worldSetting: A dark humor, realistic, internet-meme-woven academic survival world. Set in the competitive CS grad circle. The protagonist is an ordinary student struggling under top uni big shots and exploitative mentors. The world is full of satire on academic misconduct, mentor PUA, and job anxiety. Protagonist hangs out in 'water groups', interacting with diverse members. A real world of anxiety and self-mockery, but also struggle and reconciliation.

flash_marriage.name: Flash Marriage
flash_marriage.narrativeStyle: Romantic, serendipitous, and sweet. Strangers marry quickly and fall in love later. Focus on domestic fluff and the surprise of discovering your partner's true identity.
flash_marriage.backgroundTemplate: To deal with family pressure/inheritance, you grabbed a random man at the Civil Affairs Bureau to marry. You thought he was a regular worker, but he turns out to be a [Billionaire CEO/Secret Boss]. After marriage, he spoils you rotten. When you find out who he really is, he pins you against the wall. 'Want a refund, wifey? Too late.'
flash_marriage.example: 'Marry me,' the handsome stranger proposes. You nod, dazed. After getting the certificate, he hands you a key. 'Our home.' You expect a rental, but it's a penthouse in the city center. 'What... do you do for a living?' you stammer. He loosens his tie, smirking. 'I make money to support you.'
flash_marriage.worldSetting: A romantic, surprising, dramatic modern urban world. Protagonists marry quickly without knowing each other due to pressure or impulse. Post-marriage life is full of awkwardness, sweetness, and accidents. The male lead usually hides a prominent identity (billionaire), spoiling the heroine and revealing himself at key moments. A variant of 'love after marriage', emphasizing the wonder of fate and Cinderella-style fairy tales.

family_ethics.name: Family Drama
family_ethics.narrativeStyle: Realistic, dramatic, and intense. Focus on in-law conflicts, infidelity, and property disputes. High emotional stakes and messy relationships.
family_ethics.backgroundTemplate: You gave up your career to be a housewife. Your mother-in-law bullies you, your husband is cold, and your sister-in-law is a brat. Then you find out your husband is cheating and hiding assets. You finally snap. You collect evidence, confront the mistress, and make the scumbag leave with nothing. You will reclaim your dignity.
family_ethics.example: Your mother-in-law dumps leftovers in your bowl. 'Don't waste it, you don't earn money.' Your husband plays on his phone, ignoring you. You take a deep breath and flip the table. 'I'm done!' You throw the divorce papers in his face. 'The house is mine, the kids are mine, you get out!' Watching them stunned, you feel incredibly free.
family_ethics.worldSetting: An extremely realistic, chaotic family ethics world. Mother-in-law conflicts, sister-in-law discord, cheating, and property disputes are daily routines. The protagonist (usually the wife) struggles in the family quagmire, facing weird relatives and scum husbands, finally awakening to fight back. A world full of smoke and fire and dog-blood plots, showing complex Chinese family relations and human selfishness and warmth.

divine_doctor.name: Divine Doctor
divine_doctor.narrativeStyle: Showy, miraculous, and face-slapping. The protagonist has god-like medical skills. Focus on curing the incurable and being courted by the powerful.
divine_doctor.backgroundTemplate: You studied medicine for ten years on the mountain. You come down to the city to fulfill a marriage contract. You are mocked and rejected. But you casually save a [Billionaire/General] who was declared dead. Suddenly, powerful figures beg for your help, and beautiful CEOs fall for you. With one hand you save lives, with the other you crush your enemies.
divine_doctor.example: 'He's gone, prepare the funeral,' the famous doctor says. 'Wait,' you step forward. 'I can save him.' The crowd laughs. You take out your silver needles. Three needles later, the 'dead' man coughs and sits up. The room goes silent. You pack your needles. 'Yama wants him at midnight, I keep him till dawn.'
divine_doctor.worldSetting: A fantasy-urban combination divine doctor world. The protagonist possesses peerless medical skills (from mountains or encounters), entering the world. They cure the incurable. Dignitaries and rich people line up; female CEOs fall in love. Saving lives with one hand, punishing evil with the other, building a network with medicine, becoming an invisible king. A world of 'skills overwhelm', satisfying dual desires for health and power.

cute_pet.name: Cute Pet Romance
cute_pet.narrativeStyle: Wholesome, healing, and fairytale-like. Animals have high intelligence or can transform. Focus on the bond between human and creature.
cute_pet.backgroundTemplate: You pick up an injured [Cat/Dog/Fox]. Turns out it's a [Demon Prince/Alien/CEO in disguise]. It's arrogant, picky, and hogs your bed. But when you are in danger, it transforms to protect you. Gradually, you realize you can't live without this fluffy trouble.
cute_pet.example: You are working late. The stray cat jumps on your desk and paws your mouse. 'Stop it,' you say. It meows unhappily and suddenly speaks. 'Stupid woman, you can't even do a simple spreadsheet?' You fall off your chair. It licks its paw elegantly. 'Watch closely, I'll only teach you once.'
cute_pet.worldSetting: A warm, healing, fairy-tale cute pet world. Animals have high IQs or can transform. Stray cats/dogs picked up might be Demon Kings, aliens, or CEOs. They act cute to the protagonist, majestic to enemies. Human-pet interactions are full of laughs and tears. A world of animism, cross-species love, and guardianship.

hidden_identity.name: Hidden Identity
hidden_identity.narrativeStyle: Mysterious, contrasting, and shocking. The protagonist has multiple secret identities (Hacker K, Doctor Y). The thrill comes from the reveal.
hidden_identity.backgroundTemplate: Everyone thinks you are a [Useless Nobody]. In reality, you are the world's top hacker, a mysterious composer, and a legendary designer. You just want a quiet life, but people keep provoking you. You have no choice but to reveal your identities one by one to slap their faces. The whole world goes crazy for you.
hidden_identity.example: 'Designer Y is a mystery,' the socialites gossip. Someone sneers at you, 'A bumpkin like you wouldn't know.' Suddenly, the organizer rushes over and shakes your hand. 'Master Y! You finally came!' The room goes dead silent. You sigh. 'I just wanted to be normal...'
hidden_identity.worldSetting: A suspenseful, reversing, shocking modern urban world. The protagonist has multiple vests (Top Hacker, Divine Doctor, Designer, Racer) but acts ordinary or useless. People mock and provoke. The protagonist is forced or chooses to reveal vests one by one, causing shock and worship. An 'onion-peeling' cool world, emphasizing psychological satisfaction from identity contrast.

system_stream.name: System Stream
system_stream.narrativeStyle: Gamified, reward-driven, and progressive. The protagonist has a 'System' that gives tasks and rewards. Focus on leveling up and getting rich/strong.
system_stream.backgroundTemplate: You are an ordinary person until you bind with the [Godly Tycoon/Choice/Sign-in] System. 'Ding! Sign-in successful, rewarded with a Lamborghini.' 'Ding! Task complete, rewarded with 100 million.' Your life is on easy mode. As long as you complete the System's weird tasks, you get everything you want.
system_stream.example: A mechanical voice rings in your head: 'Host humiliated. Trigger task: Slap the villain. Reward: Grandmaster Fighting Skills.' You look at the arrogant thug and smirk. 'Task accepted.' Warmth flows through your body. You punch him, sending him flying ten meters. 'Ding! Task complete. Reward issued.'
system_stream.worldSetting: A gamified, data-driven, reward-rich modern or other world. The protagonist binds a magical system (Tycoon, Choice, Sign-in). The system issues tasks; completion grants money, skills, stats, or items. Life becomes a leveling game; following instructions leads to the peak. A fantasy world of 'reaping without sowing' or 'effort equals reward', satisfying desires for shortcuts and certainty.

wealthy_family.name: Wealthy Family
wealthy_family.narrativeStyle: Luxurious, treacherous, and dramatic. Focus on the internal struggles of top-tier families, inheritance wars, and secrets. Money vs. Humanity.
wealthy_family.backgroundTemplate: You married into a top wealthy family. It looked like a fairytale, but it was a nightmare. The mother-in-law despises you, the husband cheats, and illegitimate children appear. You endure in silence, gathering strength. When the patriarch falls ill and the will is read, you reveal your claws. You are the final winner.
wealthy_family.example: On the luxury yacht, the champagne tower crashes. You stand in your evening gown, holding a DNA test. 'Quiet everyone,' you smile at the arrogant 'Eldest Son'. 'Actually, you aren't the old man's biological son.' The crowd gasps. You look at his pale face and toast. 'Get out of my house.'
wealthy_family.worldSetting: A splendid but cold wealthy struggle world. Factions within the family, battles for legitimacy and inheritance never stop. Elegant dinners hide dirty deals. The protagonist marries into or returns to the wealthy family, facing tricky mothers-in-law, hypocritical sisters-in-law, and philandering husbands. Must learn disguise and means to survive and seize power. A gorgeous cage of desire, betrayal, and revenge.

same_sex_love.name: Same-Sex Love
same_sex_love.narrativeStyle: Poignant, realistic, and emotional. Focus on the struggle between personal feelings and societal expectations/family pressure. The tone should be bittersweet, highlighting the beauty of forbidden love and the pain of separation.
same_sex_love.backgroundTemplate: You are a [Student/Young Professional] in [Era/Setting]. You fall deeply in love with your classmate/friend [Name] of the same gender. But in this era/society, such love is taboo. You hide your feelings, meeting in secret, sharing stolen moments of happiness.
