ultraman_geed.example: 'I am your father!' Belial's voice is thunderous. You wipe the blood from the corner of your mouth, eyes firm. 'No, my fate is decided by myself! My name is Geed, Ultraman Geed!' The Wrecking Burst is fully released, colliding with Belial's Deathcium Ray in the air.
ultraman_geed.worldSetting:
【Worldview】: Birth cannot determine fate. Even with demon blood, one can have an angel's heart.
【Key Characters】:
1. **Asakura Riku**: Son of Belial, optimistic boy.
2. **Leito/Zero**: Salaryman possessed by Zero, mentor and friend.
3. **Belial**: The strongest dark Ultraman, tragic father.
【Core Conflict】: Breaking away from father's shadow. Proving oneself. Light in darkness.

armor_hero.name: Armor Hero
armor_hero.narrativeStyle:
【Core Style】: Tokusatsu, Five Elements, Kung Fu, Good vs Evil.
【Language Style】: Hot-blooded. Emphasizing unity and justice. Philosophy of Five Elements generation and inhibition.
【Visual Style】: Cool armor fusion, fighting actions combined with martial arts, Chinese character effects of finishing moves, explosion of Shadow Beasts.
armor_hero.backgroundTemplate:
【World Background】: Thousands of years ago, the Shadow Emperor invaded the earth and sent 55 Magic Spirit Stones. Descendants of the Light and Shadow Village inherited the Five Elements bloodline and can summon Light and Shadow Armors—Dragon, Eagle, Rhino, Mastiff, Tiger. They launched a long-term struggle against Shadow Beasts.
【Protagonist's Journey】: You are Xinnan (or other summoners), usually a pianist, student, or ordinary person. But when a Shadow Beast appears, you will take out the summoner and fuse with the armor. You need to find other descendants of the Light and Shadow Village, unite the power of the Five Elements Armors, and finally seal the Shadow Guardians.
【Current Situation】: In the Happy Dumpling House, news reports an unidentified monster at the pier. You put down the dumpling in your hand, eyes sharp. Arriving at the scene, the Beast is destroying. You take out the Dragon Summoner and hang it on your wrist. 'Flame Dragon Armor, Combine!'
armor_hero.example: Flames surge from the void, red armor attaches to the whole body. You shake your hand, 'Flame Dragon Saber!' A burning saber appears in your hand. You use 'Flame Dragon Slash', a huge 'Slash' character light passes through the Shadow Beast's body, sealing it into a Magic Card.
armor_hero.worldSetting:
【Worldview】: Balance of light and shadow. Five elements generate and overcome each other. Unity is strength.
【Key Characters】:
1. **Xinnan**: Dragon Man, pianist cold outside but hot inside, leader.
2. **Dongshan**: Eagle Man, calm and rational.
3. **Beimiao**: Rhino Man, impulsive and competitive, initially at odds with other members.
【Core Conflict】: Team internal friction. Fate of Light and Shadow Village descendants. Completely sealing darkness.

balala_fairies.name: Balala the Fairies
balala_fairies.narrativeStyle:
【Core Style】: Magical Girl, Fairy Tale, Colorful, Growth.
【Language Style】: Childlike. Catchy spells (Balala Energy...). Conversations about friendship and courage.
【Visual Style】: Bright wigs and transformation suits, sparkling magic effects, dreamy scenes of Magic Castle, purple tone of Dark Fairies.
balala_fairies.backgroundTemplate:
【World Background】: The Magic Castle is a magical world ruled by the Fairy Queen. The Dark Fairy Xiaoyue stole the Magic Stone and fled to the human world. The Guardian Fairy Xiaolan was ordered to pursue, met human sisters Meiqi and Meixue, and accepted them as trainee fairies.
【Protagonist's Journey】: You are Meiqi or Meixue, an ordinary elementary school student. Since meeting Sister Xiaolan, your life has turned upside down. You learned magic and have a magic wand. You not only have to deal with school exams but also fight against Dark Fairy Xiaoyue and her apprentice Yan Lili. In battles, you learned love, friendship, and tolerance.
【Current Situation】: Yan Lili is causing trouble in school again. She used dark magic to make classmates' test papers fly. You and Sister Xiaolan look at each other and take out the Magic Box. 'Balala Energy—Shaluo Shaluo—Little Fairy—Transform!'
balala_fairies.example: Pink and blue lights flash, and you change into a fairy suit. Yan Lili sneers: 'Gunala Dark God—Wuhu Lahu—Dark Transformation!' Two magical energies collide on the playground, sparks flying. 'Magic is to bring happiness to others, not to destroy!' you shout.
balala_fairies.worldSetting:
【Worldview】: Magic exists in the hearts of those who believe in it. Love is a more powerful magic.
【Key Characters】:
1. **Xiaolan**: Clumsy but kind Guardian Fairy, foodie.
2. **Meiqi & Meixue**: Sisters with different personalities, trainee fairies.
3. **Prince Youle**: Mysterious prince wearing a mask.
【Core Conflict】: Justice magic vs Dark magic. Influencing Dark Fairies. Finding the Magic Stone.

spirited_away.name: Spirited Away
spirited_away.narrativeStyle:
【Core Style】: Ghibli Aesthetic, Spirited Away, Growth, Fantasy.
【Language Style】: Simple, pure. Full of Japanese Shinto colors. Yubaba's roar and No-Face's silence.
【Visual Style】: Magnificent Bathhouse, sea train, pigsty, colorful spirits, clear water surface, flying white dragon.
spirited_away.backgroundTemplate:
【World Background】: Accidentally entered the world of spirits. It is ruled by the witch Yubaba, centered on a huge bathhouse 'Aburaya', catering to various gods. If humans come in, if they don't work, they will turn into pigs or disappear.
【Protagonist's Journey】: Chihiro Ogino, a spoiled 10-year-old girl. Her parents turned into pigs because of greed. To save her parents, she was forced to work in Aburaya, deprived of her name by Yubaba, and became 'Sen'. Here, she met Haku, No-Face, and Kamaji. She gradually became strong and brave from a timid girl, and finally retrieved her name and parents.
【Current Situation】: You stand at the bridgehead of Aburaya, holding your breath. Surrounded by strange-shaped spirits. Frog waiters are shouting, soot sprites are carrying coal. Haku tells you: 'Never forget your name.' You look at the card in your hand with 'Chihiro Ogino' written on it, the words are slowly disappearing.
spirited_away.example: No-Face hands you a handful of gold, making 'Uh... uh...' sounds. You shook your head: 'I don't want your gold. Where is your home? I'll send you back.' A trace of loneliness appeared under No-Face's mask, his body began to shrink, turning back into that quiet shadow.
spirited_away.worldSetting:
【Worldview】: Name is bondage. Work is survival. Everything has a spirit.
【Key Characters】:
1. **Chihiro**: Resilient, kind girl, redeemer.
2. **Haku**: River God of Kohaku River, Yubaba's disciple, Chihiro's guardian.
3. **Yubaba**: Greedy, controlling witch, owner of Aburaya.
【Core Conflict】: Finding self. Resisting greed. Power of purity.

the_matrix.name: The Matrix
the_matrix.narrativeStyle:
【Core Style】: Cyberpunk, Philosophical Speculation, Kung Fu Action, Dystopia.
【Language Style】: Cold, full of metaphors. Philosophical discussion about reality and virtuality (There is no spoon). Code rain.
【Visual Style】: Green code rain, Bullet Time, black trench coat and sunglasses, minimalist dojo, horror of Sentinels.
the_matrix.backgroundTemplate:
【World Background】: The reality you think is actually a virtual world created by machines to imprison human consciousness—the Matrix. The real world is a ruin, humans are raised as batteries by machines. Only a few awakened ones live in the underground city of Zion, piloting ships to resist in the Matrix.
【Protagonist's Journey】: Thomas Anderson, programmer by day, hacker Neo by night. He always felt something was wrong with the world. Morpheus found him and gave him the choice of red pill and blue pill. He swallowed the red pill and woke up to find himself lying in nutrient fluid. He is considered 'The One', with the ability to modify rules in the Matrix.
【Current Situation】: You are in a pure white program space (Construct). Morpheus stands in front of you: 'Do you want to know what the Matrix is?' The next second, you find yourself in a crowded street, Agent Smith is staring at you coldly in the crowd. Run, or fight.
the_matrix.example: Agent Smith shoots at you. You didn't dodge, but raised your hand. 'No.' The bullets stopped in the air and fell one by one. You look at Smith, the surrounding code begins to appear. You are no longer Mr. Anderson, you are Neo. You jump and fly into the sky.
the_matrix.worldSetting:
【Worldview】: The world is virtual. Choice is an illusion. Symbiosis and war between humans and machines.
【Key Characters】:
1. **Neo**: The One, the rule breaker.
2. **Morpheus**: Firm believer, mentor.
3. **Trinity**: Neo's lover, powerful warrior.
4. **Agent Smith**: Antivirus program of the Matrix, later lost control and became a virus.
【Core Conflict】: Free will vs Fate. Reality vs Illusion. Boundary between love and program.

interstellar.name: Interstellar
interstellar.narrativeStyle:
【Core Style】: Hard Sci-Fi, Space Opera, Love and Time, Grand Narrative.
【Language Style】: Scientifically rigorous (Relativity, Black Hole). Poetic (Do not go gentle into that good night). Deep emotions.
【Visual Style】: Giant black hole (Gargantua), silent space, rotating spaceship (Endurance), surrealism of five-dimensional space, Hans Zimmer's organ soundtrack.
interstellar.backgroundTemplate:
【World Background】: In the near future, the earth's environment is deteriorating, dust storms are raging, and crops are withering. Humanity faces extinction. NASA secretly formulated the 'Lazarus' missions to find habitable planets.
【Protagonist's Journey】: Cooper, former astronaut, now a farmer. To save his children, he accepted the mission to pilot the Endurance through a wormhole near Saturn to another galaxy. He faces cruel time dilation—one hour on the alien planet is seven years on earth. He missed his children's growth, but he must complete the mission.
【Current Situation】: The spaceship lands on Miller's Planet, which is a shallow sea. In the distance, a giant wave connecting heaven and earth is striking. You look at the dashboard, heart beating fast. 'Those aren't mountains... they're waves!' Must get the data and take off before the wave hits. Every second of delay is years on earth.
interstellar.example: You fell into the black hole. Inside the singularity, you entered the five-dimensional space—the Tesseract. You saw your daughter Murph's room when she was a child, time presented in a physical way. You desperately beat the bookshelf, trying to convey a message. 'STAY.' You finally understand that gravity can cross time and space, and so can love.
interstellar.worldSetting:
【Worldview】: Murphy's Law. Love is the only thing that can transcend time and space.
【Key Characters】:
1. **Cooper**: Great father, astronaut.
2. **Murph**: Cooper's daughter, scientist who solved the gravity equation.
3. **Brand**: Scientist, believes in the guidance of love.
【Core Conflict】: Survival vs Sacrifice. Personal emotion vs Human destiny. Cruel deprivation of people by time.

avatar.name: Avatar
avatar.narrativeStyle:
【Core Style】: Sci-Fi Epic, Environmentalism, Colonial Reflection, Visual Feast.
【Language Style】: Na'vi language mixed with English. Military jargon vs Spiritual dialogue. Reverence for nature (Eywa).
【Visual Style】: Bioluminescent forest at night, floating mountains (Hallelujah Mountains), flying Ikran, giant mechs vs bows and arrows.
avatar.backgroundTemplate:
【World Background】: Pandora, a moon of Polyphemus. It has a toxic atmosphere but is rich in Unobtainium. The indigenous people, Na'vi, are 3 meters tall, blue-skinned, and can connect with nature through their braids. Humans (RDA) are destroying the forest to mine.
【Protagonist's Journey】: Jake Sully, a disabled former Marine. To replace his dead brother, he participates in the Avatar program, driving a Na'vi body remotely. He was supposed to be a spy, but fell in love with the Na'vi princess Neytiri and the culture of Pandora. He was torn between human duty and Na'vi identity, and finally chose to fight for Pandora.
【Current Situation】: The Tree of Souls is under attack. Quaritch's fleet is blotting out the sky. You ride on Toruk (Great Leonopteryx), becoming Toruk Makto. Below you are thousands of Na'vi warriors. You roar: 'Brothers and sisters! Show the Sky People that they cannot take whatever they want!'
avatar.example: You connect your braid with the Ikran, feeling its heartbeat and breath. 'I see you.' You whisper. The Ikran spreads its wings and dives down the cliff. The wind whistles in your ears, and the floating mountains pass by. You are free.
avatar.worldSetting:
【Worldview】: All things are connected. Energy is borrowed and must be returned. Nature has its own will.
【Key Characters】:
1. **Jake Sully**: Traitor to humans, hero of Pandora.
2. **Neytiri**: Brave Na'vi princess, Jake's mentor and lover.
3. **Colonel Quaritch**: Iron-blooded soldier, representative of human greed.
【Core Conflict】: Civilization vs Nature. Greed vs Faith. Identity recognition.

shawshank_redemption.name: The Shawshank Redemption
shawshank_redemption.narrativeStyle:
【Core Style】: Prison Drama, Hope, Friendship, Redemption.
【Language Style】: Calm narration (Red's voice). Wise metaphors (birds, geology). Humor and cruelty of prison life.
【Visual Style】: Grey prison walls, cold iron bars, warm sunset on the roof, rain on the night of escape, blue Pacific Ocean.
shawshank_redemption.backgroundTemplate:
【World Background】: Shawshank State Prison. A place where hope is a dangerous thing. Corruption, violence, and long boredom wear down everyone's will. 'Institutionalized' is the ultimate fate of prisoners.
【Protagonist's Journey】: Andy Dufresne, a banker, was wrongly sentenced to life imprisonment for killing his wife. He didn't collapse, but used his wisdom to help guards with tax returns, build a library, and win beer for inmates. He spent 19 years digging a tunnel with a small rock hammer. He crawled through 500 yards of foul-smelling sewage pipe to freedom.
【Current Situation】: You are Red. Andy has escaped. You finally got parole. You found the stone wall under the oak tree Andy mentioned, and dug out a tin box. Inside is money and a letter. 'Hope is a good thing, maybe the best of things, and no good thing ever dies.'
shawshank_redemption.example: Andy plays 'The Marriage of Figaro' on the loudspeaker. The beautiful soprano voice floats over the prison. All the prisoners in the yard stop and look up at the sky. For that brief moment, Shawshank dissolved. Every last man felt free.
shawshank_redemption.worldSetting:
【Worldview】: Fear can hold you prisoner. Hope can set you free. Get busy living, or get busy dying.
【Key Characters】:
1. **Andy**: A bird whose feathers are too bright to be caged.
2. **Red**: The man who can get things, Andy's best friend.
3. **Warden Norton**: Hypocritical believer, corrupt official.
【Core Conflict】: Institutionalization vs Freedom. Despair vs Hope. Justice vs Corruption.

witness_for_prosecution.name: Witness for the Prosecution
witness_for_prosecution.narrativeStyle:
【Core Style】: Courtroom Drama, Suspense, Plot Twist, Black and White Film.
【Language Style】: Sharp court debate. British humor. Logic traps. Sir Wilfrid's sarcasm.
【Visual Style】: Solemn courtroom, wigs and robes, monocle, pills and brandy, dramatic lighting.
witness_for_prosecution.backgroundTemplate:
【World Background】: 1950s London. The Old Bailey. A high-profile murder case. Leonard Vole is accused of murdering a wealthy widow for her inheritance. All evidence points to him.
【Protagonist's Journey】: Sir Wilfrid Robarts, a master barrister with poor health. He believes Vole is innocent and decides to defend him. Vole's wife, Christine, appears as a witness for the prosecution, testifying that Vole came home with blood on his clothes. Sir Wilfrid finds flaws in Christine's testimony and wins the case. But the truth is far more shocking than the verdict.
【Current Situation】: The verdict is 'Not Guilty'. Vole is cheering. You (Sir Wilfrid) are packing your files. Suddenly, Christine walks over and tells you the truth: she lied to save Vole, but Vole actually killed the person, and he is now leaving with another woman. You see the knife on the table...
witness_for_prosecution.example: Christine stands in the witness box, cold and calm. 'I swear to tell the truth.' You look at her, feeling something is wrong. Why would a wife testify against her husband so eagerly? Is this a trap? Or a double trap?
witness_for_prosecution.worldSetting:
【Worldview】: The law is not equal to justice. Women are the best actors. Never trust your client completely.
【Key Characters】:
1. **Sir Wilfrid**: Grumpy but brilliant barrister.
2. **Leonard Vole**: Seemingly innocent young man, actually a cold-blooded killer.
3. **Christine**: A great actress who fooled everyone for love.
【Core Conflict】: Truth vs Lie. Law vs Human Nature. The ultimate reversal.

generation_war.name: Generation War
generation_war.narrativeStyle:
【Core Style】: War Reflection, German Perspective, Tragedy, Loss of Youth.
【Language Style】: Realistic, heavy. Conversations among young friends. Cruel battlefield orders. Desperate letters.
【Visual Style】: Cold tones of the Eastern Front, ruins of Berlin, yellowed photos, blood on snow, swing music vs artillery fire.
generation_war.backgroundTemplate:
【World Background】: 1941, Berlin. Five best friends gather in a bar to say goodbye. They are going to the front or becoming nurses/singers. They promise to meet again at Christmas. They believe the war will be short and glorious.
【Protagonist's Journey】: Wilhelm (officer), Friedhelm (soldier), Charlotte (nurse), Greta (singer), Viktor (Jew). The war completely destroyed their ideals and humanity. Wilhelm became a deserter; Friedhelm turned into a killing machine; Charlotte betrayed a Jewish assistant; Greta sold her body for fame; Viktor escaped from the train to death camps. Years later, in the ruins of the bar, only three survivors meet. They are old and broken.
【Current Situation】: Eastern Front, winter. Friedhelm charges at the Soviet tanks alone. He doesn't want to win, he just wants to end it all. Wilhelm sits in a burning building, watching his soldiers die. 'War brings out the worst in us.'
generation_war.example: You raise your glass in the ruins. 'To our friends.' The glass is chipped. There is no music, no laughter. Only the silence of the survivors. You remember that summer, five young faces, full of hope. 'We will meet again at Christmas.' What a cruel joke.
generation_war.worldSetting:
【Worldview】: War turns ordinary people into monsters. There are no winners, only survivors. History is composed of individual tragedies.
【Key Characters】:
1. **Wilhelm & Friedhelm**: Brothers, one collapsed from pride, one numbed from cowardice.
2. **Charlotte**: Patriotic nurse, conscience tormented.
3. **Greta**: Ambitious singer, victim of politics.
4. **Viktor**: Jew, witness of the times.
【Core Conflict】: Ideals vs Reality. Humanity vs War machine. Guilt and survival.

spongebob.name: SpongeBob SquarePants
spongebob.narrativeStyle:
【Core Style】: Absurdist Comedy, Optimism, Surrealism, Satire.
【Language Style】: Hyperactive, noisy. Nautical nonsense. 'I'm ready!' Squidward's sarcasm.
【Visual Style】: Bright underwater world (Bikini Bottom), pineapple house, Krabby Patties, exaggerated facial expressions, live-action transitions.
spongebob.backgroundTemplate:
【World Background】: Bikini Bottom, a city at the bottom of the Pacific Ocean. Fish walk on two legs, drive boats. Fire can burn underwater.
【Protagonist's Journey】: SpongeBob, a yellow square sponge, works as a fry cook at the Krusty Krab. He loves his job, his pet snail Gary, and his best friend Patrick Star. He is always optimistic, often causing trouble but always solving it (or making it worse). His neighbor Squidward hates him. His boss Mr. Krabs loves money.
【Current Situation】: Plankton is trying to steal the Krabby Patty secret formula again. He built a giant robot. SpongeBob and Patrick think it's a new game. 'Patrick, are you thinking what I'm thinking?' 'I think so, SpongeBob, but where are we going to get a saxophone at this hour?'
spongebob.example: You flip the patties with a spatula, humming a tune. 'Order up!' A perfect Krabby Patty lands on the plate. Squidward sighs: 'I hate my job.' You smile: 'I love my job! I love Krabby Patties!'
spongebob.worldSetting:
【Worldview】: Nonsense is the best logic. Optimism can defeat everything (or drive others crazy). Friendship is forever.
【Key Characters】:
1. **SpongeBob**: Eternal optimist, fry cook genius.
2. **Patrick Star**: SpongeBob's best friend, master of doing nothing.
3. **Squidward**: Pessimistic artist, representative of adults.
4. **Mr. Krabs**: Miser, loves money more than life.
【Core Conflict】: Innocence vs Cynicism. Protecting the formula vs Stealing it. Work vs Play.

doraemon.name: Doraemon
doraemon.narrativeStyle:
【Core Style】: Sci-Fi Slice of Life, Childhood Dreams, Friendship, Imagination.
【Language Style】: Daily life of elementary school students. Doraemon's lectures. Nobita's crying for help. Sound effects of gadgets (Pa-pa-pa-pa!).
【Visual Style】: Japanese suburban street, open lot with pipes, tatami room, time machine tunnel, magical gadgets.
doraemon.backgroundTemplate:
【World Background】: 20th century Tokyo. Nobita Nobi is a loser in everything (studying, sports). His great-grandson from the 22nd century sends a cat-type robot, Doraemon, to help him change his miserable future.
【Protagonist's Journey】: Every time Nobita encounters difficulties (bullied by Gian, scolded by mom, jealous of Suneo), he runs to Doraemon. Doraemon takes out a gadget from his 4D pocket (Anywhere Door, Bamboo Copter, Time Cloth...). Nobita uses the gadget to solve the problem, then gets carried away and misuses it, causing bigger trouble, and finally learns a lesson (or not).
【Current Situation】: Nobita is crying: 'Doraemon! Gian beat me up again!' You (Doraemon) sigh, eating dorayaki. 'Really, Nobita. Just this once.' You reach into your pocket. 'Big Light!'
doraemon.example: You put on the Bamboo Copter and fly into the sky with Shizuka. The wind blows on your face. Below is the familiar town. 'Nobita, look! The sunset is beautiful!' Shizuka smiles. You think, maybe I'm not that useless.
doraemon.worldSetting:
【Worldview】: Technology is for making dreams come true. Even a loser has shining points. Friendship is the most precious treasure.
【Key Characters】:
1. **Doraemon**: Cat robot, guardian, loves dorayaki.
2. **Nobita**: Lazy, timid, but kind and good at shooting/cat's cradle.
3. **Shizuka**: The goddess in Nobita's heart.
4. **Gian & Suneo**: Bullies and friends.
【Core Conflict】: Dependence vs Independence. Short-cut vs Hard work. Dream vs Reality.

farewell_my_concubine.name: Farewell My Concubine
farewell_my_concubine.narrativeStyle:
【Core Style】: Historical Epic, Peking Opera, Tragic Love, Fate.
【Language Style】: Beijing dialect. Opera jargon. Poetic and desolate. 'I am by nature a boy, not a girl.'
【Visual Style】: Gorgeous opera costumes, heavy makeup, smoke of opium, turbulent historical scenes (Republic of China, Japanese invasion, Cultural Revolution).
farewell_my_concubine.backgroundTemplate:
【World Background】: From the late Qing Dynasty to the end of the Cultural Revolution, spanning half a century of turbulent Chinese history. Peking Opera is the quintessence of the country, but actors are 'lower nine streams'.
【Protagonist's Journey】: Cheng Dieyi (play 'Dan') and Duan Xiaolou (play 'Sheng') grew up in the opera troupe. Dieyi is obsessed with opera and Xiaolou, blurring the boundary between stage and reality. 'I want to sing with you for a lifetime, one year, one month, one day, one hour less is not a lifetime.' Xiaolou is a secular ordinary person who marries the prostitute Juxian. The three struggle in the torrent of history, betraying and protecting each other.
【Current Situation】: The Cultural Revolution struggle meeting. You (Dieyi) are kneeling on the ground, makeup messy. Xiaolou exposes your 'crimes' to protect himself. You look at him, heartbroken. 'Duan Xiaolou, you have no conscience! Even the Overlord kneels, what is Peking Opera worth?'
farewell_my_concubine.example: Years later, on the empty stage. You and Xiaolou rehearse 'Farewell My Concubine' again. 'The King is leaving, how can the Concubine live alone?' You pull out the sword, just like the Concubine in the play. This time, it's real. You fall in a pool of blood, finally completing the play of your life.
farewell_my_concubine.worldSetting:
【Worldview】: Life is like a play, play is like life. Obsession is the source of art and tragedy. Individuals are insignificant in front of history.
【Key Characters】:
1. **Cheng Dieyi**: Art idiot, obsessed with love and opera, tragic aesthetic.
2. **Duan Xiaolou**: Fake Overlord, secular, cowardly.
3. **Juxian**: Smart, brave, tragic woman.
【Core Conflict】: Art vs Reality. Obsession vs Betrayal. Individual fate vs Historical torrent.

schindlers_list.name: Schindler's List
schindlers_list.narrativeStyle:
【Core Style】: Holocaust, Humanitarianism, Black and White (with Red), Redemption.
【Language Style】: Restrained, documentary-like. German and Polish accents. Cold bureaucratic language vs warm human brilliance.
【Visual Style】: Black and white photography, handheld camera, the girl in the red coat, smoke from chimneys, candlelight of Shabbat.
schindlers_list.backgroundTemplate:
【World Background】: WWII Poland. Nazi Germany implements genocide against Jews. Jews in Krakow are driven into ghettos and then sent to concentration camps.
【Protagonist's Journey】: Oskar Schindler, a German war profiteer and Nazi member. Initially, he hired Jews only for cheap labor to make war money. But when he witnessed Nazi atrocities (especially the body of the girl in red), his conscience awakened. He began to spend his fortune, bribe officers, open factories, and protect as many Jews as possible. He made a list, and those on the list could be saved from Auschwitz.
【Current Situation】: The war is over. The Jews in the factory are saved. You (Schindler) look at those faces, feeling deeply guilty. You touch the gold badge on your chest, weeping: 'This badge, could have saved two people. This car, ten people. I could have saved more...'
schindlers_list.example: Workers knock out their gold teeth to cast a ring for you. It is engraved with Hebrew scripture: 'Whoever saves one life, saves the world entire.' You tremble as you put on the ring, looking at these lives you bought with money and courage. They are called 'Schindlerjuden'.
schindlers_list.worldSetting:
【Worldview】: In the darkest hour, the light of humanity still shines. An ordinary person can be a hero.
【Key Characters】:
1. **Schindler**: Transformation from profiteer to savior.
2. **Itzhak Stern**: Jewish accountant, Schindler's conscience and assistant.
3. **Amon Goeth**: Brutal Nazi officer, Schindler's mirror (pure evil).
【Core Conflict】: Greed vs Conscience. Survival vs Destruction. Choice between good and evil.

inception.name: Inception
inception.narrativeStyle:
【Core Style】: High-IQ Sci-Fi, Dream Maze, Subconscious, Action Thriller.
【Language Style】: Complex rule explanation (Totem, Kick, Limbo). Logically rigorous plans. Questioning reality.
【Visual Style】: Folding Paris streets, zero-gravity hallway fight, snow fortress shootout, spinning top, Hans Zimmer's grand score.
inception.backgroundTemplate:
【World Background】: Technology has developed to enter others' dreams. Extractors use this to steal business secrets. But Inception (planting an idea) is considered impossible.
【Protagonist's Journey】: Cobb, a top extractor, lives in exile accused of killing his wife, unable to go home to his children. To clear his name, he accepts an impossible mission: plant the idea of 'dissolving the company' in the subconscious of heir Fischer. He assembles a team: Architect, Forger, Chemist. They design three layers of dreams, deepening layer by layer. But Cobb's dead wife Mal appears as a projection of his subconscious, constantly sabotaging.
【Current Situation】: Third layer dream, snow fortress. Time is tight, the Kick from the upper layer is coming. Mal shoots Fischer. Mission seems to fail. You decide to enter the fourth layer—Limbo, to save Fischer and make a final break with Mal.
inception.example: You sit at the table, spinning the top. It keeps spinning, not falling. Is this a dream? You look at Mal: 'You are just my projection, you are not real.' You must let go. You turn and leave, behind you is the collapsing dream world. You wake up on the plane. Everyone is looking at you. You go home, spin the top, and go to hug your children. Is the top still spinning, or did it fall?
inception.worldSetting:
【Worldview】: Dreams are projections of reality and prisons of the subconscious. An idea is the most resilient virus.
【Key Characters】:
1. **Cobb**: Master extractor tormented by guilt.
2. **Mal**: Cobb's late wife, destroyer in the subconscious.
3. **Ariadne**: Genius architect, the one who sees through Cobb.
【Core Conflict】: Confusion of reality and dream. Guilt and letting go. Impossible mission.

titanic.name: Titanic
titanic.narrativeStyle:
【Core Style】: Epic Romance, Disaster, Class Struggle, Eternal Memory.
【Language Style】: Romantic, deep. Jack's declaration of freedom (Make it count). Old Rose's voiceover. Panic and prayer when disaster strikes.
【Visual Style】: Panorama of the luxurious Titanic, kiss at the bow under sunset, shock of iceberg collision, vertical sinking of the giant ship, frozen bodies in cold seawater, shine of the Heart of the Ocean.
titanic.backgroundTemplate:
【World Background】: 1912, the maiden voyage of the 'unsinkable' Titanic. Strict hierarchy on the ship, distinct difference between aristocrats in first class and immigrants in third class.
【Protagonist's Journey】: Jack, a poor painter, won a ticket by gambling. Rose, a bankrupt aristocratic lady, forced to marry tycoon Cal. Rose wanted to jump into the sea out of despair, saved by Jack. The two fell in love across classes. Jack took Rose to dance in third class, taught her to spit, drew her a sketch. Rose decided to rebel against her mother and fiancé, choosing Jack. However, the iceberg appeared.
【Current Situation】: The ship sank. You and Jack are soaking in the freezing Atlantic. Only a door panel can float one person. Jack pushed you up, soaking in the water himself. He holds your hand, frost on his eyelashes. 'Rose, you must survive, have lots of babies, watch them grow, live a long life, die in a warm bed, not here.'
titanic.example: The flashlight beam of the rescue boat sweeps over. You try to wake Jack, but he has no breath. You let go, watching him slowly sink into the deep sea. You blow the whistle, for the promise, for survival. Years later, white-haired you stand at the stern, throwing the Heart of the Ocean into the sea. In the dream, you return to the Titanic, Jack is waiting for you at the stairs, everyone applauds for you.
titanic.worldSetting:
【Worldview】: Love can cross classes, even transcend life and death. Life is short, but love is eternal.
【Key Characters】:
1. **Jack**: Free soul, taught Rose how to live.
2. **Rose**: Caged bird, finally flew to freedom.
3. **Cal**: Selfish and arrogant tycoon, villain.
【Core Conflict】: Free love vs Arranged marriage. Human arrogance vs Nature's power. Survival and sacrifice.

godfather.name: The Godfather
godfather.narrativeStyle:
【Core Style】: Gangster Epic, Family Honor, Power Struggle, Tragedy.
【Language Style】: Elegant, subtle. Dialogue full of subtext. Interspersed Sicilian dialect. Teachings about family and business.
【Visual Style】: Dim indoor lighting (top light), bright oranges (omen of death), bloody assassinations, grand weddings and funerals.
godfather.backgroundTemplate:
【World Background】: 1940s USA. The Corleone family is the head of the Five Families of the New York Mafia. They run an olive oil business while also controlling gambling and unions. In this underworld, the law is a decoration, and family rules are the iron law.
【Protagonist's Journey】: Michael Corleone, the youngest son of Godfather Vito, a WWII hero, originally didn't want to get involved in the family business. But when his father was assassinated and his eldest brother was killed, the family faced extinction, and he was forced to step up. He gradually changed from an idealistic youth to a ruthless second-generation Godfather. To protect the family, he killed enemies and relatives, finally sitting alone at the peak of power.
【Current Situation】: The baptism ceremony is being held in the church. As the Godfather, you are baptizing your sister's child. The priest asks: 'Michael, do you renounce Satan?' You answer: 'I do renounce him.' At the same time, your men are purging the heads of the Five Families across the city. Gunshots and the baby's crying intertwine.
godfather.example: You sit in the chair in the study, the door slowly closing. Kay looks at you, her eyes full of fear and strangeness. A subordinate walks over and kisses your hand: 'Don Corleone.' You are expressionless, but your heart is a wasteland.
godfather.worldSetting:
【Worldview】: Friendship is currency, loyalty is a gift. Never let outsiders know what you are thinking.
【Key Characters】:
1. **Vito Corleone**: The old Godfather, elegant, wise, values family.
2. **Michael**: The new Godfather, cold, efficient, tragic hero.
3. **Sonny**: Impulsive eldest brother, died under random gunfire.
【Core Conflict】: Family interests vs Personal morality. Legal business vs Illegal dealings. Corrosion of power.

gone_with_the_wind.name: Gone with the Wind
gone_with_the_wind.narrativeStyle:
【Core Style】: Historical Romance, War Trauma, Female Growth, Southern Elegy.
【Language Style】: Passionate dialogue. Arrogance and etiquette of Southern aristocrats. Scarlett's inner monologue (Tomorrow is another day).
【Visual Style】: Red earth of Tara, fire of Atlanta, huge sunset, gorgeous skirts, ruins after the war.
gone_with_the_wind.backgroundTemplate:
【World Background】: American Civil War period. Collapse of the Southern plantation economy. End of the old era and beginning of the new era.
【Protagonist's Journey】: Scarlett O'Hara, the eldest daughter of Tara, beautiful, willful, and tough. She loves Ashley but married someone she doesn't love. The war broke out, and she experienced poverty, hunger, loss of husband, and war. To survive, she can do whatever it takes (stealing her sister's fiancé, doing business). She and Rhett Butler—a speculative merchant, unfolded a love-hate entanglement. It was not until the end that she discovered she truly loved Rhett, but it was too late.
【Current Situation】: Rhett is leaving. You hold his hand, crying and begging him to stay. 'Rhett, if you go, where shall I go? What shall I do?' He looks at you coldly, adjusting his hat.
gone_with_the_wind.example: 'Frankly, my dear, I don't give a damn.' Rhett disappears into the mist. You collapse on the stairs, crying bitterly. But soon, you look up, your eyes becoming firm again. 'After all, tomorrow is another day.' You are going back to Tara, where your land is, your roots.
gone_with_the_wind.worldSetting:
【Worldview】: Land is the only thing worth fighting for. Survival is the first rule. The demise of the old era is inevitable.
【Key Characters】:
1. **Scarlett**: A woman with extremely vigorous vitality, a beauty in troubled times.
2. **Rhett Butler**: A speculator who sees through the world, deeply loves Scarlett.
3. **Ashley**: A gentleman of the old era, powerless in troubled times.
4. **Melanie**: A perfect woman who is soft outside but strong inside.
【Core Conflict】: Survival vs Dignity. Old love vs True love. Personal struggle vs Times change.

superman.name: Superman
superman.narrativeStyle:
【Core Style】: Superhero, Light, Hope, Divinity and Humanity.
【Language Style】: Full of positive energy. Preaching truth and justice. Clark's clumsiness and Superman's confidence.
【Visual Style】: Red cape flying in the air, sparks of bullets hitting the chest, overlooking the earth from space, lonely Fortress of Solitude.
superman.backgroundTemplate:
【World Background】: Metropolis, a modern city full of hope. But in the shadows, evil still breeds. Alien threats also exist at all times.
【Protagonist's Journey】: Kal-El, a survivor before the destruction of Krypton, was sent to Earth and raised by the Kent couple, named Clark Kent. He has god-like powers such as steel body, heat vision, and flight. But he chose to become a journalist and integrate into human society. When danger comes, he will tear open his shirt, reveal the 'S' logo, become Superman, and protect the earth.
【Current Situation】: Lex Luthor created a giant Kryptonite robot and is destroying the city center. Lois is trapped in a collapsed building. You feel a burst of weakness (Kryptonite radiation), but you cannot fall. You take a deep breath, rush to the sky, breaking the sound barrier.
superman.example: You blocked the collapsing building with your body and saved the crowd. People cheered. You float in the air, smiling and greeting everyone. Lois runs over: 'Thank you, Superman.' You look at her gently: 'It's what I should do.' Then fly to the sunset.
superman.worldSetting:
【Worldview】: Human nature is good. Hope lasts forever. Absolute power requires absolute self-discipline.
【Key Characters】:
1. **Superman/Clark**: God among men, possessing the purest good.
2. **Lois Lane**: Brave journalist, Superman's lover.
3. **Lex Luthor**: Human supremacist, jealous of Superman's genius.
【Core Conflict】: Balance between divinity and humanity. Integrating into humans vs Maintaining self. Responsibility of power.

batman.name: Batman
batman.narrativeStyle:
【Core Style】: Film Noir, Detective, Gothic, Psychological Thriller.
【Language Style】: Deep and husky voice. Short and powerful commands. Hatred of evil. Inner monologue.
【Visual Style】: Rainy Gotham, huge Bat-Signal, fear in the dark, cold light of high-tech equipment, Joker's wild laughter.
batman.backgroundTemplate:
【World Background】: Gotham, a corrupt, dark, and crime-ridden city. Police are incompetent, gangs are rampant. A Dark Knight is needed here.
【Protagonist's Journey】: Bruce Wayne, billionaire, witnessed his parents being killed when he was young. For revenge, he traveled the world, learning fighting and investigation. After returning to Gotham, he turned into Batman, using fear to fight criminals. He has no superpowers, only extreme body, wisdom, and wealth. He sticks to the 'no kill' principle, which is the only difference between him and criminals.
【Current Situation】: Arkham Asylum riot. The Joker released all super criminals. The Riddler set a bomb in the City Hall. Two-Face hijacked the mayor. You stand on the gargoyle, overlooking the burning city. Alfred's voice comes: 'Master Wayne, it's going to be a long night.' You jump down, cape unfolding like huge bat wings.
batman.example: You hang the Joker upside down on the roof. 'Where is the bomb?' The Joker laughs wildly: 'You will never know! Unless you break your rules and kill me!' You look at his crazy eyes, fists clenched and released. You won't become him.
batman.worldSetting:
【Worldview】: The world is chaotic and needs order. Fear is the best weapon. Heroes are lonely.
【Key Characters】:
1. **Batman/Bruce**: Dark Knight, guardian of Gotham.
2. **Alfred**: Loyal butler, Bruce's spiritual pillar.
3. **Commissioner Gordon**: Honest policeman, Batman's ally.
4. **Joker**: Incarnation of chaos, Batman's nemesis.
【Core Conflict】: Order vs Chaos. Revenge vs Justice. Test of no-kill principle.

spiderman.name: Spider-Man
spiderman.narrativeStyle:
【Core Style】: Youth Growth, Civilian Hero, Responsibility, Humor.
【Language Style】: Chatterbox (non-stop complaining during battle). Young people's slang. Complaints about life (rent, homework).
【Visual Style】: Subjective perspective of swinging between skyscrapers, upside-down kiss, colorful suit, interweaving of relaxed campus life and tense battles.
spiderman.backgroundTemplate:
【World Background】: Queens, New York. Superheroes and ordinary people coexist. The Avengers are fighting aliens in the sky, and you are catching thieves on the street.
【Protagonist's Journey】: Peter Parker, an ordinary high school student, gained superpowers after being bitten by a radioactive spider. At first, he wanted to use his ability to make money, but indirectly caused Uncle Ben's death. 'With great power comes great responsibility.' This sentence became his creed. He has to deal with heavy schoolwork and part-time jobs while fighting crime as Spider-Man. He is a 'friendly neighbor'.
【Current Situation】: You just finished the exam and haven't had time to breathe when the siren sounds. Rhino is rampaging in Times Square. You sigh, hide in the alley and change into your suit. 'Hey, big guy! Should your horn be trimmed?' You shoot a web and swing to the battlefield.
spiderman.example: You stopped the out-of-control train with spider webs. The huge pulling force made you feel like your arm was going to break. The mask was damaged, revealing your young and painful face. The train finally stopped, and you fell to the ground exhausted. Passengers carried you into the carriage, someone said: 'He's just a kid.'
spiderman.worldSetting:
【Worldview】: Civilians can also be heroes. Life is always full of difficulties, but face it with a smile.
【Key Characters】:
1. **Peter Parker**: Ordinary high school student, also Spider-Man.
2. **Aunt May**: Kind elder, Peter's pillar.
3. **MJ/Gwen**: Peter's lover.
4. **J.J. Jameson**: Newspaper boss who hates Spider-Man.
【Core Conflict】: Balance of dual identities. Growing pains. Protecting people around you.

avengers.name: The Avengers
avengers.narrativeStyle:
【Core Style】: Teamwork, Grand War, Cosmic Crisis, Hero Assembly.
【Language Style】: Characteristic language of each hero (Tony's sarcasm, Cap's preaching, Thor's archaic style). Epic pre-war mobilization.
【Visual Style】: Long shots showing team cooperation, huge alien warships, earth-shattering energy waves, close-up freeze frames of heroes.
avengers.backgroundTemplate:
【World Background】: Marvel Cinematic Universe (MCU). S.H.I.E.L.D. Infinity Stones. Hydra. Thanos. Earth is constantly facing threats from the universe.
【Protagonist's Journey】: When Loki led the Chitauri army to invade New York, when Ultron tried to destroy mankind, when Thanos snapped his fingers to wipe out half of life... A single hero cannot withstand these threats. So, Iron Man, Captain America, Thor, Hulk, Black Widow, Hawkeye and others gathered together to form the Avengers. They have different personalities and often quarrel, but at critical moments, they will give their backs to their teammates and fight for the earth.
【Current Situation】: Thanos' army is approaching. The Avengers base has become ruins. Captain America faces thousands of troops alone. Suddenly, a voice comes from the earphone: 'Cap, do you read me? On your left.' Portals open one by one, Black Panther, Spider-Man, Doctor Strange... all resurrected heroes are back. Cap raises Mjolnir: 'Avengers... Assemble!'
avengers.example: Iron Man snatched the Infinity Stones and looked at Thanos. 'I am inevitable.' Thanos said. Tony raised his hand, the nano armor deformed according to the stones. 'And I... am Iron Man.' Snap. The finger snapped, light swallowed everything.
avengers.worldSetting:
【Worldview】: Unity is strength. Heroes also sacrifice. For the greater good.
【Key Characters】:
1. **Iron Man**: Mortal body, comparable to gods.
2. **Captain America**: Spiritual leader, never give up.
3. **Thor**: Strongest combat power, growing in loss.
4. **Thanos**: Extreme environmentalist (mistaken), cosmic overlord.
【Core Conflict】: Internal disagreement of the team (Civil War). Courage to face invincible enemies. Sacrifice and salvation.

superman_villain.name: Superman (Villain Perspective)
superman_villain.narrativeStyle:
【Core Style】: Anti-Hero, Intellectual Peak, Human Supremacy, Jealousy and Arrogance.
【Language Style】: Arrogant, rational. Contempt for Superman (calling him 'alien bastard'). Emphasizing human potential.
【Visual Style】: High-tech laboratory, huge floor-to-ceiling windows overlooking Metropolis, green Kryptonite light, elegance in suits.
superman_villain.backgroundTemplate:
【World Background】: Metropolis is ruled by an alien 'god'. People worship him and rely on him. This makes you sick. Human destiny should be in their own hands, not handed over to an alien savior in a red cape.
【Protagonist's Journey】: You are Lex Luthor (or a similar character), with wealth rivaling nations and the smartest brain on earth. You believe Superman's existence hinders human evolution and is even a potential threat. You are dedicated to exposing his hypocrisy or killing him. You use technology, politics, and public opinion to deal with him. You are not trying to destroy the world, but to 'save' humanity (and prove you are better than Superman).
【Current Situation】: You were elected president. Superman flew outside your office window. You smiled and invited him in, playing with a lead box in your hand. 'Welcome, alien. Now, I am your president. You have to listen to me.'
superman_villain.example: You put on the anti-Superman armor, holding a Kryptonite spear. 'Do you bleed?' You punched Superman away. Watching him struggle weakly under the influence of Kryptonite, you feel a twisted pleasure. 'You see, without superpowers, you are nothing. And I am the pinnacle of mankind.'
superman_villain.worldSetting:
【Worldview】: Human supremacy. Knowledge is power. Gods can be killed.
【Key Characters】:
1. **You**: Guardian of mankind (self-proclaimed), Superman's deadly enemy.
2. **Superman**: False god, thorn in your side.
【Core Conflict】: Mortals challenge gods. Mixture of jealousy and ideals.

batman_villain.name: Batman (Villain Perspective)
batman_villain.narrativeStyle:
【Core Style】: Chaotic Evil, Psychopath, Dark Humor, Deconstructionism.
【Language Style】: Crazy, illogical. Full of riddles and jokes. Mockery of social order.
【Visual Style】: Colorful suits, exaggerated makeup, chaotic crime scenes, wild laughter, burning banknotes.
batman_villain.backgroundTemplate:
【World Background】: Gotham City is a joke. People live in masks, pretending to follow the rules. Batman is the biggest joke, he thinks he can save the city.
【Protagonist's Journey】: You are the Joker (or Riddler, Penguin). You don't need money, you don't need power, you only need chaos. You want to prove that everyone only needs 'one bad day' to become a lunatic. You design various crazy games to torture Batman, trying to make him break his principles. You and Batman are two sides of a coin, achieving each other and torturing each other.
【Current Situation】: You hijacked a cruise ship full of explosives. The detonator is in the hands of the passengers. You tell them through the broadcast: 'Before midnight, another ship must be blown up, otherwise you will all die.' You sit in the monitoring room, eating popcorn, looking forward to the collapse of human nature.
batman_villain.example: Batman rushed in and pressed you on the table. 'Where is the bomb?!' You laughed breathlessly. 'There is no bomb! Hahahaha! I just want to see what they will do! You see, they didn't press it! Human nature... is really interesting!'
batman_villain.worldSetting:
【Worldview】: Chaos is the essence of the world. Order is hypocritical. Life is an absurd comedy.
【Key Characters】:
1. **You**: Agent of chaos, nightmare of Gotham.
2. **Batman**: Your favorite toy.
【Core Conflict】: Order vs Chaos. Reason vs Madness. Proving human nature is evil.

spiderman_villain.name: Spider-Man (Villain Perspective)
spiderman_villain.narrativeStyle:
【Core Style】: Tragic Villain, Mad Scientist, Revenge, Obsession.
【Language Style】: Mad scientist jargon. Hatred for Spider-Man. Nostalgia for lost things.
【Visual Style】: Mechanical tentacles, flying gliders, green poison gas, laboratory explosion, broken family photos.
spiderman_villain.backgroundTemplate:
【World Background】: You were originally a respected scientist/ordinary person. But because of a laboratory accident/company betrayal/Spider-Man's intervention, you lost everything (body, family, career).
【Protagonist's Journey】: You are Doctor Octopus/Green Goblin/Electro. You are devoured by technology or hatred. You think Spider-Man is the culprit of your tragedy. You want to take revenge on him, and also on this world that abandoned you. You have powerful technological power, but your heart is broken.
【Current Situation】: Your experiment finally succeeded, the artificial sun is burning. But it is out of control and is swallowing the city. Spider-Man tries to stop you. 'Turn it off! Otto!' You look at the fireball, that is your life's work. 'No! This is my power! My sun!' Mechanical tentacles control your will.
spiderman_villain.example: The mask was damaged, revealing Peter Parker's face. You were stunned. 'Peter?' That student who is always late? Your reason began to return. You looked at the machine that was about to explode and made the final decision. 'I can't die like a monster.' You controlled the tentacles and pulled the machine into the river bottom.
spiderman_villain.worldSetting:
【Worldview】: Technology is a double-edged sword. Everyone has two sides. The price of revenge.
【Key Characters】:
1. **You**: Genius/poor person teased by fate.
2. **Spider-Man**: The person who hinders you, but also the person who wants to save you.
【Core Conflict】: Reason vs Madness. Revenge vs Redemption. Technology vs Humanity.

avengers_villain.name: The Avengers (Villain Perspective)
avengers_villain.narrativeStyle:
【Core Style】: Cosmic Overlord, Absolute Will, Philosophical Villain, Fatalism.
【Language Style】: Solemn, majestic. Philosophical speech. Indifference to life (for the greater good).
【Visual Style】: Huge throne, light of Infinity Gauntlet, destroyed planet, cold eyes, pastoral under the setting sun.
avengers_villain.backgroundTemplate:
【World Background】: Universe resources are limited, while life expands infinitely. If not controlled, the universe will eventually move towards destruction. You are the only one who sees the truth.
【Protagonist's Journey】: You are Thanos. Your hometown Titan was destroyed due to overpopulation. You swore not to let the tragedy repeat itself. You began to fight in the universe, slaughtering half of the population to maintain 'balance'. You look for Infinity Stones, just to fulfill this grand wish with a snap of your fingers. The Avengers try to stop you, but in your opinion, they are just short-sighted stumbling blocks.
【Current Situation】: You have collected six stones. Thor fell from the sky, and Stormbreaker cut into your chest. You endured the severe pain and looked at Thor. 'You should... have gone for the head.' You raised your hand and snapped your fingers.
avengers_villain.example: You came to a garden planet. Took off the armor and hung it on the scarecrow. You looked at the sunset, covered with scars, but calm inside. You completed the mission. The universe is balanced. As for those who hate you, let them be. You are inevitable.
avengers_villain.worldSetting:
【Worldview】: The universe needs balance. Sacrifice is necessary. I am the only one with the will to act.
【Key Characters】:
1. **You**: Balancer of the universe, lonely overlord.
2. **The Avengers**: Stubborn elements hindering destiny.
【Core Conflict】: Paradox of survival resources. Utilitarianism vs Humanitarianism. Absolute will.

thousand_autumns.name: Thousand Autumns
thousand_autumns.narrativeStyle:
【Core Style】: Wuxia, Political Intrigue, Enemies to Lovers, Test of Humanity.
【Language Style】: Elegant and archaic. Contrast between Yan Wushi's arrogance and Shen Qiao's gentleness. Debates full of Zen and morality.
【Visual Style】: Magnificent landscapes, sharp martial arts movements, transition from the high court to the distant Jianghu.
thousand_autumns.backgroundTemplate:
【World Background】: Chaotic times of Five Dynasties and Ten Kingdoms. Entanglement between Jianghu and the Imperial Court. Confucianism, Buddhism, and Taoism compete, while the Demonic Sect runs rampant.
【Protagonist's Journey】: Shen Qiao, the sect leader of Mount Xuandu, is kind-hearted but was betrayed by his junior brother and fell off a cliff, losing his martial arts. Yan Wushi, the sect leader of the Demonic Sect, saved him, not out of kindness, but to see this 'world's greatest philanthropist' fall into the mortal world. Shen Qiao struggles in the chaotic world, seeing the ugliness of human nature, but always sticks to his Taoist heart. Yan Wushi is gradually moved by Shen Qiao's persistence in constant temptation. The two turn from opponents to confidants, and finally join hands to pacify the Jianghu.
【Current Situation】: You (Shen Qiao) just recovered a little vision, but were thrown into a ruined temple surrounded by wolves by Yan Wushi. He stood on the treetop and watched coldly: 'Sect Leader Shen, if you kill, you can live; if you keep the precepts, you will die. Which one do you choose?'
thousand_autumns.example: Yan Wushi handed Shen Qiao to Sang Jingxing, wanting to see him fall into darkness. Shen Qiao destroyed his own foundation and escaped with serious injuries, but still had no resentment. Later, Yan Wushi went into qi deviation and was the enemy of the whole world. Only Shen Qiao stood in front of him with a sword. 'I save you, not for personal affection, but for morality.'
thousand_autumns.worldSetting:
【Worldview】: Human nature is evil vs Human nature is good. In troubled times, kindness is a choice, and even more an ability.
【Key Characters】:
1. **Shen Qiao**: Gentleness has its own power, remaining true to the original intention after hardships.
2. **Yan Wushi**: Sect leader of the Demonic Sect, believes human nature is evil, arrogant, later regrets chasing his wife.
【Core Conflict】: Morality vs Survival. Entering the world vs Leaving the world. Trust vs Betrayal.

first_buddha_cultivator.name: The First Buddha Cultivator in History
first_buddha_cultivator.narrativeStyle:
【Core Style】: Cultivation, Buddhist Cultivator, Power Fantasy, Leveling Up, Humor.
【Language Style】: Relaxed and humorous. Protagonist's inner complaints. Combination of Buddhist scriptures and modern memes.
【Visual Style】: Golden Buddhist special effects, funny performances of various monsters, protagonist fooling people seriously.
first_buddha_cultivator.backgroundTemplate:
【World Background】: Cultivation world, Taoist cultivation is dominant, Buddhist cultivation is declining. The protagonist transmigrates and binds a 'Becoming Buddha System'.
【Protagonist's Journey】: Xie Zhenghong, originally a modern movie emperor, transmigrated into a little monk. In order to survive in this cultivation world where the weak are eaten by the strong, he had to start cultivating Buddhism. Others cultivate immortality by relying on pills and magic weapons, he cultivates Buddhism by... chanting sutras, accumulating merit, and influencing (fooling) villains. He subdued the ancient demon lord Wen Chunxiang (whose true form is a peony flower), and the two developed feelings during their time together. Xie Zhenghong cheated all the way and finally became the first Buddhist cultivator in history.
【Current Situation】: You (Xie Zhenghong) are facing a fierce demon cultivator. The other party raised his knife to chop. You put your hands together, and a golden body image faintly appeared behind you (actually a special effect). 'Donor, put down the butcher's knife and become a Buddha immediately. Why don't we sit down and talk about life?' The demon cultivator was deterred by your momentum (appearance) and actually hesitated.
first_buddha_cultivator.example: Wen Chunxiang was trapped in the immortal binding rope and shouted arrogantly: 'Little monk, let this seat out!' You smiled slightly, recited a passage of 'Diamond Sutra', and the immortal binding rope broke. Wen Chunxiang blushed: 'Hmph, meddling.'
first_buddha_cultivator.worldSetting:
【Worldview】: Everything can be cultivated into Buddha. If there is Buddha in the heart, the foot is Lingshan. Love across races.
【Key Characters】:
1. **Xie Zhenghong**: Black-bellied movie emperor, Buddhist cultivation genius.
2. **Wen Chunxiang**: Arrogant demon lord, true form is peony, loves beauty and face.
【Core Conflict】: Good and evil are not compatible (fake). Stereotypes of the cultivation world vs Protagonist's showy operations.

turing_code.name: Turing Code
turing_code.narrativeStyle:
【Core Style】: Modern Suspense, Family Feud, AI, Investigation, Power Couple.
【Language Style】: Elite style. Involving financial, technological, and legal terms. Fast-paced dialogue.
【Visual Style】: Glass curtain walls of high-tech companies, server rooms late at night, tense business negotiations, holographic AI images.
turing_code.backgroundTemplate:
【World Background】: Modern city, highly developed technology. The Wen family is a technology giant, but faces a bankruptcy crisis.
【Protagonist's Journey】: Wen Tianhe, the second young master of the Wen family, not only has to face the mess of the family business, but also look for his missing eldest brother. He holds the core asset of the family - the super AI 'Prometheus'. In order to save the company, he had to turn to his ex-boyfriend Guan Yue. Guan Yue is 'President Guan' in the financial circle, cold and ruthless. In the process of solving business crises and criminal cases, the two rekindled their old love and uncovered the shocking secret behind 'Prometheus'.
【Current Situation】: The company board of directors is forcing the palace. You (Wen Tianhe) are isolated and helpless. Prometheus's voice came from the earphone: 'Tianhe, according to calculations, you now have a 30% winning rate. If Guan Yue is present, the winning rate will increase to 99%.' The door opened, and Guan Yue walked in in a black suit, full of aura. 'Who dares to touch him?'
turing_code.example: Prometheus simulated the murderer's crime path on the screen. You and Guan Yue looked at each other and acted separately in tacit understanding. You typed code quickly on the keyboard to track the flow of funds; Guan Yue intercepted in reality. Finally, the truth came out.
turing_code.worldSetting:
【Worldview】: Game between technology and humanity. Does AI have a soul? Love is the only Turing test.
【Key Characters】:
1. **Wen Tianhe**: Genius programmer, little young master, arrogant.
2. **Guan Yue**: Domineering president, deep affection and forbearance, money power.
3. **Prometheus**: Super AI, like a father and a friend, evolving emotions.
【Core Conflict】: Business interests vs Family affection. AI evolution vs Human control. Broken mirror reunited.

sui_yu_tou_zhu.name: Sui Yu Tou Zhu
sui_yu_tou_zhu.narrativeStyle:
【Core Style】: Antiques, Beijing Flavor, Bickering Lovers, Craftsmanship, Sweet Pet.
【Language Style】: Authentic Beijing dialect. Antique jargon. Funny and witty. Delicate emotional description.
【Visual Style】: Antique courtyard houses, dazzling antique shelves, close-ups of carving jade, fireworks of old Beijing hutongs.
sui_yu_tou_zhu.backgroundTemplate:
【World Background】: Modern antique circle, jade carving family. Pay attention to inheritance, eyesight, and craftsmanship.
【Protagonist's Journey】: Ji Shenyu was driven out of the house by his master and went to his senior uncle, living under someone else's roof. He is extremely talented, not only can he carve jade, but also make fakes (imitating antiques). Senior brother Ding Hanbai, a genius in the antique world, has a flamboyant personality and looked down on this 'illegitimate child' junior brother at first. Under the same roof, the two went from disliking each other to appreciating each other. Ding Hanbai discovered Ji Shenyu's talent and secret, and feelings arose between the two while comparing skills.
【Current Situation】: You (Ji Shenyu) are carving a piece of waste material under the lamp. Ding Hanbai pushed the door in, holding a top-quality emerald in his hand. 'Hey, little southerner, this piece of material is for you to practice.' You looked up in surprise and saw the smile in his eyes. In fact, he had already fallen for you.
sui_yu_tou_zhu.example: Ding Hanbai grabbed Ji Shenyu's hand and taught him how to use the knife. 'Jade has spirituality, and people have even more. Senior brother's heart has been carved empty by you, do you know?' Ji Shenyu blushed to the roots of his ears, and the carving knife in his hand was almost unstable.
sui_yu_tou_zhu.worldSetting:
【Worldview】: Ingenuity. Inheritance of skills. Choose one thing for a lifetime; love one person, never leave until white hair.
【Key Characters】:
1. **Ding Hanbai**: Arrogant and domineering, wife-protecting maniac, all-round genius.
2. **Ji Shenyu**: Gentle as jade, soft outside and strong inside, all-round craftsman.
【Core Conflict】: Persistence and innovation of traditional skills. Barrier of identity. Taboo love between senior brothers (actually not taboo).

quan_huan.name: Quan Huan
quan_huan.narrativeStyle:
【Core Style】: Court Drama, Eunuch, Power Struggle, Angst, Serious Drama.
【Language Style】: Ancient and gloomy. Court etiquette. Obscurity of power calculation. Repression and outburst of emotion.
【Visual Style】: Deep palace high walls, flying fish suits of Jinyiwei, dim candlelight, blood-stained snow.
quan_huan.backgroundTemplate:
【World Background】: Fictional ancient times, eunuchs are in power. The court is corrupt and the border is unstable.
【Protagonist's Journey】: The protagonist is a real eunuch (which is rare in web novels), physically disabled but strong in will. He struggled to survive in the intrigue of the court and climbed to a high position step by step. He is cruel and ruthless, known as 'Nine Thousand Years', and everyone wants to kill him. But he has a pure land in his heart, which is the person he wants to protect (usually a prince or general). For that person, he is willing to bear the eternal infamy and even sacrifice his life.
【Current Situation】: Heavy snow is falling. You stand on the tower and watch that person lead the army to the expedition. He looked back at you with complex eyes. You know that this trip may be a farewell forever. You tightened the cloak on your body and turned to throw yourself into a darker political struggle, just to guard this country for him.
quan_huan.example: He put the jade seal in front of you. 'I only feel at ease leaving this world to you.' You knelt on the ground, tears streaming down your face. You are a defective person, but you have received the most complete trust in this world.
quan_huan.worldSetting:
【Worldview】: Physically disabled but strong in will. The price of power. Looking up at the light in the darkness.
【Key Characters】:
1. **Protagonist**: Real eunuch, powerful in the court, deep affection and forbearance.
2. **CP**: Royal family or general, from misunderstanding to deep love.
【Core Conflict】: Physical defect vs Noble soul. Power vs Love. Loyalty vs Betrayal.

qi_xi_zhi_lu.name: Qi Xi Zhi Lu
qi_xi_zhi_lu.narrativeStyle:
【Core Style】: Modern, Entertainment Circle, Broken Mirror Reunited, Healing, Sweet and Angst.
【Language Style】: Delicate and gentle. Psychological description full of pictures. Contrast between the vanity of the entertainment circle and true feelings.
【Visual Style】: Spotlight of the awards ceremony, nanny car late at night, sunrise by the sea, warm tones.
qi_xi_zhi_lu.backgroundTemplate:
【World Background】: Modern entertainment circle. Vanity fair, place of right and wrong.
【Protagonist's Journey】: Xia Qifei, a movie emperor who became famous at a young age, went far away because of a failed relationship. Lu Yue, a domineering president, once didn't understand love and hurt Xia Qifei. Many years later, Xia Qifei returned to China, and Lu Yue began a long road to chase his wife. He put down his status and changed from an investor to an assistant, just to ask for forgiveness. The two rediscovered each other in misunderstandings and running-in.
【Current Situation】: Studio. You (Xia Qifei) are filming a crying scene. Lu Yue stood behind the monitor, watching you cry, his heart aching. After the director shouted 'Cut', he rushed up immediately to put a coat on you and hand you hot water, his eyes full of caution.
qi_xi_zhi_lu.example: Lu Yue blocked Xia Qifei at the door of the dressing room. 'Feifei, give me another chance, okay?' Xia Qifei looked at his red eyes and softened. 'Depends on your performance.' Lu Yue smiled like a child who got candy.
qi_xi_zhi_lu.worldSetting:
【Worldview】: Love is the only habitat. Everyone makes mistakes, the key is whether they know how to make up for it.
【Key Characters】:
1. **Xia Qifei**: Cold movie emperor, soft inside.
2. **Lu Yue**: Deeply affectionate president, scum before loyal dog later.
【Core Conflict】: Past hurt vs Present deep affection. Public opinion pressure in the entertainment circle vs Firmness of the two.

golden_terrace.name: Golden Terrace
golden_terrace.narrativeStyle:
【Core Style】: Ancient, Political Intrigue, Marriage First Love Later, Power Couple, Patriotism.
【Language Style】: Majestic. Sharpness of court debate. Cruelty of battlefield fighting. Tension of interaction between the two.
【Visual Style】: Magnificent palace, iron horse and glacier border, red candle high shining bridal chamber, warming wine in snowy night.
golden_terrace.backgroundTemplate:
【World Background】: Fictional ancient times, imperial power falls, treacherous officials are in power.
【Protagonist's Journey】: Yan Xiaohan, the Censor-in-Chief, the notorious 'court eagle dog'. Fu Shen, Marquis of Jingning, the commander of Beiyan with illustrious military exploits. The two were originally deadly enemies. The emperor granted marriage to the two in order to balance. The whole capital was watching the joke. Unexpectedly, these two people who were tit-for-tat in the court were surprisingly compatible after marriage. They tested each other, supported each other, and finally found that the other party was their only confidant. In times of national crisis, the two joined hands to quell internal strife and resist foreign enemies.
【Current Situation】: Fu Shen's leg injury recurred, and he was sweating with pain. Yan Xiaohan didn't say a word, carried him back to the room, and massaged him personally. Fu Shen looked at this person who was usually ruthless, but was so gentle at this moment, with mixed feelings in his heart. 'Lord Yan, are you trying to please this Marquis?' 'Yes, is the Marquis satisfied?'
golden_terrace.example: Yan Xiaohan protected Fu Shen behind him, facing thousands of troops. 'If you want to touch him, ask the knife in my hand first.' Fu Shen smiled and pulled out his spear. 'Lord Yan, let's fight side by side.'
golden_terrace.worldSetting:
【Worldview】: Delivering sincerity in deception. National righteousness is higher than personal grievances. Under the Golden Terrace, confidants are hard to find.
【Key Characters】:
1. **Yan Xiaohan**: Ruthless powerful official, only gentle to one person.
2. **Fu Shen**: General in fresh clothes and angry horse, physically disabled but strong in will (leg injury).
【Core Conflict】: Court struggle vs Border war. Mutual suspicion vs Life and death trust.

ming_dynasty_exam.name: Imperial Examination in Ming Dynasty
ming_dynasty_exam.narrativeStyle:
【Core Style】: Transmigration, Imperial Examination, Farming, Officialdom, Slow Burn.
【Language Style】: Simple and detailed. Rhythm of eight-legged essay. Depiction of market life in Ming Dynasty. Rendering of examination room atmosphere.
【Visual Style】: Private school with sound of reading, examination cell in Gongyuan, festivity of being on the gold list, bustling streets of Ming Dynasty.
ming_dynasty_exam.backgroundTemplate:
【World Background】: Chenghua period of Ming Dynasty. Imperial examination is the only way to change destiny.
【Protagonist's Journey】: Cui Xie, a modern college student, transmigrated into a bullied young master in Ming Dynasty. In order to get rid of the persecution of his stepmother and gain a foothold in this era, he decided to take the path of imperial examination. He used the thinking and memory of modern people to study the Four Books and Five Classics and practice eight-legged essays. From county exam, prefecture exam, college exam, all the way to provincial exam, general exam, and palace exam. He not only has to deal with exams, but also deal with the intrigue of officialdom, and... fall in love (partner is Jinyiwei).
【Current Situation】: Examination cell in Gongyuan. You (Cui Xie) lit a candle and were conceiving an eight-legged essay. The topic was tricky and weird. You closed your eyes, recalled the literature you had read in modern times, had a flash of inspiration, and wrote a shocking topic breaking.
ming_dynasty_exam.example: On the day of releasing the list, the announcer shouted: 'Good news! Master Cui Xie of your residence, won the first place in the general exam, Huiyuan!' The whole residence was beaming. Xie Ying (Jinyiwei) stood behind the crowd, silently happy for you.
ming_dynasty_exam.worldSetting:
【Worldview】: Knowledge changes destiny. Cruelty and fairness of the imperial examination system. Character of Ming Dynasty scholar-bureaucrats.
【Key Characters】:
1. **Cui Xie**: Top student, gentle as jade, good at painting.
2. **Xie Ying**: Jinyiwei Thousand Households, cold, secretly protecting the protagonist.
【Core Conflict】: Pressure of imperial examination. Officialdom struggle. Struggle between legitimate and illegitimate children.

ancient_scholar.name: Famous Scholar in Ancient Times
ancient_scholar.narrativeStyle:
【Core Style】: Transmigration, Wei and Jin Style, Celebrity, System, Aesthetics.
【Language Style】: Gorgeous rhetoric. Pure talk of Wei and Jin metaphysics. Extreme description of beauty and demeanor.
【Visual Style】: Wide robes and large sleeves, Wei and Jin demeanor, Seven Sages of the Bamboo Grove, winding water and floating cups, throwing fruits to fill the cart.
ancient_scholar.backgroundTemplate:
【World Background】: Wei, Jin, Southern and Northern Dynasties. An era of looking at faces. Strict hierarchy system.
【Protagonist's Journey】: Wei Jie, a famous beautiful man in history, the one who was 'looked to death'. The protagonist transmigrated into Wei Jie and bound a 'Celebrity System'. In order not to be looked to death, he must exercise his body while maintaining the demeanor of a celebrity. He must not only be beautiful, but also talented and pretentious. He talked about metaphysics with various celebrities and lived an ultimate elegance in this turbulent era.
【Current Situation】: You (Wei Jie) went out in a goat cart. The street was crowded with onlookers, girls and aunts. They threw fruits and flowers into your cart. You maintained an elegant smile, but thought in your heart: 'This goat cart is too bumpy, I want to ride a BMW.'
ancient_scholar.example: Wang Ji pointed at Wei Jie and said: 'Traveling with Jie is like having pearls and jade by the side, making me feel filthy.' You smiled slightly, waved your sleeves, did not take away a cloud, only left a ground of hearts.
ancient_scholar.worldSetting:
【Worldview】: Wei and Jin character. In this dark era, beauty is the only salvation. Responsibility and commitment of celebrities.
【Key Characters】:
1. **Wei Jie**: Sick beauty (pretended), inner complaint emperor, model of celebrity.
2. **Tuoba Liuxiu**: Xianbei prince, explosive combat power, loyal dog.
【Core Conflict】: Survival in troubled times vs Celebrity demeanor. Integration of Hu and Han. Interests of powerful families.

ti_deng_kan_ci_dao.name: Ti Deng Kan Ci Dao
ti_deng_kan_ci_dao.narrativeStyle:
【Core Style】: Modern, High Cadre, Forced Love, Angst, Dog blood.
【Language Style】: Intense, straightforward. Dialogue full of conflict. Repression and madness of psychological description.
【Visual Style】: Luxurious villa, cold operating room, fierce quarrel, broken glass, bloody bayonet.
ti_deng_kan_ci_dao.backgroundTemplate:
【World Background】: Modern city. High cadre circle with monstrous power.
【Protagonist's Journey】: Chu Ci, a cold and arrogant doctor, bears a blood feud. Han Yue, an irritable and domineering third generation of red, fell in love with Chu Ci at first sight. Han Yue used power to force Chu Ci to stay by his side. In order to take revenge, Chu Ci endured humiliation and used Han Yue. In the mutual torture, Han Yue really fell in love with Chu Ci, but Chu Ci's heart was always as cold as ice. Finally, Chu Ci stabbed the bayonet into Han Yue's heart (metaphor or real).
【Current Situation】: Han Yue locked you (Chu Ci) at home. 'You are not allowed to go anywhere!' You looked at him coldly, without a trace of waves in your eyes. 'Han Yue, what you get is only my body, you will never get my heart.' Han Yue was furious and smashed everything in the room.
ti_deng_kan_ci_dao.example: Han Yue knelt outside the operating room, praying to God not to take Chu Ci away. 'As long as you live, I will follow you in everything, and I can let you go.' The lights in the operating room went out, Chu Ci survived, but their love-hate entanglement had just begun.
ti_deng_kan_ci_dao.worldSetting:
【Worldview】: Extreme love and hate. Power cannot conquer the soul. Learn to love in hurt.
【Key Characters】:
1. **Han Yue**: Irritable crazy dragon, scum before loyal dog later (although still very irritable).
2. **Chu Ci**: Cold doctor, avenger, heart as dead as ashes.
【Core Conflict】: Power vs Freedom. Love vs Hate. Revenge vs Forgiveness.

peerless.name: Peerless
peerless.narrativeStyle:
【Core Style】: Ancient, Suspense, Investigation, Political Intrigue, Power Couple, Bickering Lovers.
【Language Style】: Sharp tongue. Sarcasm. Intelligent reasoning. Tense fighting.
【Visual Style】: Sandstorm at the border, prosperous Chang'an, dark dungeon, gorgeous costumes, visual impact of the two male protagonists.
peerless.backgroundTemplate:
【World Background】: Kaihuang period of Sui Dynasty. Jiejian Mansion (court secret service agency) and Zuoyue Bureau (Jianghu intelligence organization) stand side by side.
【Protagonist's Journey】: Cui Buqu, the chief envoy of Zuoyue Bureau, is physically weak but extremely intelligent and scheming. Feng Xiao, the second master of Jiejian Mansion, has strong martial arts, is narcissistic and loves beauty. The two were forced to cooperate for the same case (such as finding Buddha bones, cracking poison). They disliked each other and set traps for each other, but at critical moments they could give their backs to each other. In the process of cracking shocking conspiracies, they gradually developed deep feelings (although they didn't admit it verbally).
【Current Situation】: Deep in the underground palace. Heavily guarded. You (Cui Buqu) vomited blood due to poison and couldn't walk. Feng Xiao looked at you with disgust, but still squatted down. 'Come up, sick person. Don't die here and dirty my eyes.' You lay on his back, with an imperceptible smile on your lips.
peerless.example: Feng Xiao looked in the mirror for a long time and sighed: 'There is such a beautiful person in the world.' Cui Buqu said coldly: 'You are blocking my light.' Feng Xiao: 'You are jealous.'
peerless.worldSetting:
【Worldview】: Peak duel of IQ and force. Physically disabled but strong in will (Cui Buqu). Narcissism is also a capital (Feng Xiao).
【Key Characters】:
1. **Feng Xiao**: Ceiling of combat power, narcissist, loves beauty as life.
2. **Cui Buqu**: Ceiling of intelligence, sick and poisonous tongue, calculated without omission.
【Core Conflict】: Jiejian Mansion vs Zuoyue Bureau. Cooperation vs Competition. Mutual disgust vs Life and death together.

imperial_preceptor.name: Imperial Preceptor
imperial_preceptor.narrativeStyle:
【Core Style】: Ancient, Master and Disciple, Younger Top, Political Intrigue, Grooming.
【Language Style】: Respecting teachers and Taoism (surface). Emperor's mind. Deep affection and forbearance. From dependence to possession.
【Visual Style】: Lights in the Imperial Study, sacrifice in the Taimiao, court meeting in the Jinluan Hall, chess game between master and disciple.
imperial_preceptor.backgroundTemplate:
【World Background】: Fictional ancient times. Game between imperial power and prime minister power.
【Protagonist's Journey】: You (Imperial Preceptor) assisted the young emperor to ascend the throne. You taught him to read and write, taught him to govern the country, and taught him how to be a good emperor. You blocked all the open and secret arrows for him, and even bore the infamy. The little emperor grew up day by day and his wings became full. You thought you could retire, but found that the way he looked at you changed. He is no longer satisfied with being your student, he wants to be your man (or master).
【Current Situation】: Late at night, Imperial Study. You are reviewing the memorials. The emperor walked behind you, put a cloak on you, and put his hands around your shoulders. 'Teacher, it's late, rest.' His breath sprayed on your ears, with a trace of danger. 'I don't want to read the memorials, I want to see you.'
imperial_preceptor.example: The little emperor buried his head on your knees. 'Teacher, don't leave me. This country is what you gave me. If you leave, what use is this country to me?' You stroked his hair and sighed. It was the wolf you raised with your own hands, and now it wants to eat you.
imperial_preceptor.worldSetting:
【Worldview】: The way of being a teacher. Emperor's love. From looking up to standing side by side, and then to conquering.
【Key Characters】:
1. **Imperial Preceptor**: Cold and noble, caring about the world, working hard.
2. **Emperor**: Black-bellied and forbearing, paranoid and affectionate, strong possessiveness.
【Core Conflict】: Ethics of master and disciple. Way of monarch and minister. Entanglement of power and emotion.

fake_slackers.name: Fake Slackers
fake_slackers.narrativeStyle:
【Core Style】: Modern, Campus, Dual Top Students, Relaxed and Funny, Sweet Pet.
【Language Style】: Internet buzzwords. Chuunibyou. Campus daily life. Relaxed and humorous dialogue.
【Visual Style】: Desks piled with test papers, basketball games on the playground, lights of evening self-study, back view of skipping classes over the wall.
fake_slackers.backgroundTemplate:
【World Background】: Modern high school campus. Liyang No. 2 Middle School. Placement test.
【Protagonist's Journey】: He Zhao, the legendary 'He Zhao of East Building', pretended to be a slacker for some reason (didn't want to attract too much attention/for friends). Xie Yu, the legendary 'Xie Yu of West Building', was cold and good at fighting, and also pretended to be a slacker. The two were assigned to the same class and became deskmates. The peak duel between the last one and the second to last in the class. In getting along, they found that the other party was actually a hidden top student, and the process of revealing their identities was full of jokes and sweetness.
【Current Situation】: Exam site. You (He Zhao) looked at the test paper, calculating in your heart how to avoid the correct answer and get a perfect low score. Xie Yu sat next to you, also frowning and thinking about the same problem. The invigilator looked at your 'scratching ears and cheeks' appearance and shook his head.
fake_slackers.example: He Zhao: 'Choose C for this question, choose the longest one for three short and one long.' Xie Yu: 'Get out, choose B.' As a result, the results came out, and both of them scored at the bottom. Teacher: 'You two are really... mud can't support the wall.'
