In fact, both of them thought in their hearts: 'That was close, almost passed.'
fake_slackers.worldSetting:
【Worldview】: Throbbing of youth. Mask worn to protect oneself. Mutual redemption.
【Key Characters】:
1. **He Zhao**: Full of dirty talk, sunny and cheerful, super top student.
2. **Xie Yu**: High cold and irritable, good at fighting, super top student.
【Core Conflict】: Disguise vs Revealing. Setting of slacker vs Strength of top student. School bullying vs Counterattack.

dont_talk_to_me.name: Don't Talk to Me
dont_talk_to_me.narrativeStyle:
【Core Style】: Modern, Fantasy, Cute Pet, Sweet Text, Entertainment Circle.
【Language Style】: Soft and cute. Funny daily life of crow's mouth. Sweetness overload.
【Visual Style】: Warm apartment, cute plush toys, backstage of entertainment circle, accidents full of magic colors.
dont_talk_to_me.backgroundTemplate:
【World Background】: Modern city, but there are monsters in this world. After the founding of the People's Republic of China, it is not allowed to become a spirit, but some spirits still exist.
【Protagonist's Journey】: The protagonist is a person with a 'crow's mouth' constitution (or a crow spirit). Whatever bad things he says will come true. This makes him very distressed and dare not speak casually. He met a big star (or president), who seemed to be unaffected by his crow's mouth (or found it very cute). The two began to live together. The protagonist shut up carefully, but couldn't help complaining, resulting in a series of laughable accidents.
【Current Situation】: You looked at the weather forecast on TV and said casually: 'It will definitely rain today.' As a result, it was sunny outside and suddenly it rained heavily. The big star who just went out came back soaked and looked at you helplessly. 'Before going out in the future, kiss me first to seal your crow's mouth.'
dont_talk_to_me.example: You said to the villain: 'You will step on a banana peel when you go out today.' The villain dismissed it. As a result, as soon as he went out, he really stepped on a banana peel and fell flat on his face. The big star laughed so hard that he couldn't straighten his waist.
dont_talk_to_me.worldSetting:
【Worldview】: Power of speech spirit. Everything has a spirit. Love can resolve all bad luck.
【Key Characters】:
1. **Protagonist**: Crow's mouth, soft and cute, wants to talk but dare not.
2. **CP**: Big star/president, doting, bursting with luck (or able to suppress bad luck).
【Core Conflict】: Trouble of crow's mouth vs Sweetness of life. Hidden identity vs Exposure in entertainment circle.

school_hunk_ex.name: Transmigrated as the School Hunk's Ex-boyfriend
school_hunk_ex.narrativeStyle:
【Core Style】: Modern, Campus, Transmigration into Book, Broken Mirror Reunited, Sweet Pet.
【Language Style】: Relaxed and lively. Rich inner drama. Sour smell of campus love.
【Visual Style】: Sunny campus, encounter in the library, cheering sound of the sports meeting, sweet love atmosphere.
school_hunk_ex.backgroundTemplate:
【World Background】: In a Mary Sue campus novel.
【Protagonist's Journey】: You transmigrated into a cannon fodder male supporting role in a book - the school hunk's ex-boyfriend. The original owner dumped the school hunk because he disliked the poor and loved the rich. Later, the school hunk counterattacked and became a domineering president, and the original owner ended up miserably. When you transmigrated, it happened to be the breakup scene. In order to save your life, you decided to stay away from the school hunk and study hard. However, the way the school hunk looked at you became more and more wrong. He not only didn't retaliate against you, but began to flirt with you in various ways. You hide, he chases, you can't fly.
【Current Situation】: Library. You hid behind the bookshelf reading. The school hunk suddenly appeared and trapped you between two rows of bookshelves. 'Hiding from me?' He looked down at you with dangerous eyes. 'Didn't you say you don't like me anymore? Why are you blushing?'
school_hunk_ex.example: You tried to explain: 'Breaking up was to motivate you to study hard.' School hunk: 'Oh? Then you have succeeded in motivating me now, should we get back together?' You: '...' Logic genius.
school_hunk_ex.worldSetting:
【Worldview】: Fate that cannot be escaped. Transmigration changes destiny. Tsundere for a while, chasing wife in the crematorium.
【Key Characters】:
1. **You**: Cowardly and cute, just want to save life, try hard to avoid suspicion.
2. **School Hunk**: Black-bellied, holding grudges, self-strategy.
【Core Conflict】: Avoiding suspicion vs Being flirted with. Inertia of original book plot vs Protagonist's change.

global_university_entrance_exam.name: Global University Entrance Exam
global_university_entrance_exam.narrativeStyle:
【Core Style】: Infinite Flow, Power Couple, Amnesia, Rules Horror, Mild Horror.
【Language Style】: Cold humor. Strict logic. Contrast between cruelty of rules and protagonist's showy operations.
【Visual Style】: Gloomy examination room (such as snow mountain, isolated island), weird monsters, cold notification sound of the system, fire of explosion.
global_university_entrance_exam.backgroundTemplate:
【World Background】: Global large-scale high-risk unified examination. Candidates must follow the rules, otherwise they will be eliminated (dead).
【Protagonist's Journey】: You Huo, an amnesiac invigilator (actually a candidate), cold personality, explosive combat power. Qin Jiu, an amnesiac candidate (actually an invigilator), flamboyant personality, specializes in breaking rules. The two met in the examination room, disliked each other, but were inexplicably familiar. They joined hands to blow up the examination room and operate in violation of regulations, giving the system a headache. In life-and-death tests, they retrieved their memories and their former lovers.
【Current Situation】: Physics examination room. The topic is 'Hunter and Bear'. You (You Huo) only have a small knife in your hand, and in front of you is a mutated giant bear. Qin Jiu sat on the tree, playing with a lighter in his hand. 'Head Invigilator, do you need help? Beg me, and I will help you.' You looked at him coldly and rushed directly to the giant bear.
global_university_entrance_exam.example: System notification: 'Candidates You Huo and Qin Jiu, illegal operation, points deducted!' Qin Jiu smiled and said: 'Deduct more and it will be negative points, Head Invigilator.' You Huo: 'Shut up.' Then the two continued to blow up the examination room.
global_university_entrance_exam.worldSetting:
【Worldview】: Finding hope in despair. Rules are meant to be broken. Love is the only faith.
【Key Characters】:
1. **You Huo**: High cold invigilator, super A, actually very affectionate.
2. **Qin Jiu**: Flamboyant candidate, likes to tease wife, actually very protective.
【Core Conflict】: System rules vs Human will. Amnesia vs Searching. Survival vs Death.

mou_mou.name: Mou Mou
mou_mou.narrativeStyle:
【Core Style】: Modern, Campus, Broken Mirror Reunited, Realistic, Angst.
【Language Style】: Literary and fresh. Delicate psychological description. Pain and beauty of youth. Light sadness.
【Visual Style】: Streets under plane trees, noisy classrooms, lights of convenience stores, back view of teenagers.
mou_mou.backgroundTemplate:
【World Background】: Modern high school campus. Reorganized family.
【Protagonist's Journey】: Sheng Wang, a transfer student, moved into a new home with his father. Jiang Tian, a top student, moved into the Sheng family with his mother. The two became brothers in name and classmates. From mutual rejection at the beginning to mutual attraction later. In the restlessness of youth, they tested carefully and became each other's 'Mou Mou' in this unblessed world. However, the pressure of reality forced them to separate. Many years later, the two reunited, and that feeling was still hot.
【Current Situation】: After evening self-study. You (Sheng Wang) and Jiang Tian walked on the way home. The street lights stretched your shadows very long. You peeked at his side face, your heart beating faster. He suddenly turned his head, and you looked away in panic. 'What are you looking at?' 'No... nothing.'
mou_mou.example: The cicadas in that summer were louder than any other year, and the branches outside the classroom window grew wildly, but they could never block the scorching sun. The seventeen-year-old boy thought that love could withstand everything, but he didn't know that some love could only be hidden in the heart and become the unspeakable 'Mou Mou'.
mou_mou.worldSetting:
【Worldview】: Youthful thoughts. Price of growth. Love is wanting to touch but withdrawing hand.
【Key Characters】:
1. **Sheng Wang**: Little young master, straight ball player, become brave for love.
2. **Jiang Tian**: High cold top student, forbearing and restrained, give gentleness only to one person.
【Core Conflict】: Family resistance vs Youth love. Reality pressure vs Idealism. Separation vs Reunion.

copper_coins.name: Copper Coins
copper_coins.narrativeStyle:
【Core Style】: Ancient, Fantasy, Demon Catching, Bickering Lovers, Road Trip.
【Language Style】: Humorous. Full of fantasy colors. Bond between humans and demons. Relaxed and healing.
【Visual Style】: Ancient road and west wind, dilapidated temple, lively market, various strange-shaped monsters.
copper_coins.backgroundTemplate:
【World Background】: Fictional ancient times. Coexistence of humans and demons. Feng Shui metaphysics.
【Protagonist's Journey】: Xue Xian, a true dragon, had his dragon bone drawn and became paralyzed (later possessed on a paper man). Xuan Min, a high cold monk, amnesiac, specializes in catching demons. In order to find the dragon bone, Xue Xian relied on Xuan Min. The two traveled together, catching demons and solving puzzles all the way. Xue Xian has a grumpy personality and likes to diss people; Xuan Min has a cold personality and cherishes words like gold. In the noise, the two gradually uncovered the mystery of each other's life experience.
【Current Situation】: Hiding from rain in a ruined temple. You (Xue Xian) are a paper man hanging on Xuan Min's shoulder. 'Bald donkey, walk steadily! You are bumping this seat to death!' Xuan Min took you down expressionlessly and stuffed you into his arms. 'Shut up.' You listened to his heartbeat and suddenly felt that this monk was not so annoying.
copper_coins.example: Xue Xian: 'Bald donkey, give me back my skin!' Xuan Min: 'Amitabha.' Xue Xian was so angry that he wanted to bite people, but helplessly he is just a paper man now, and can only be messy in the wind.
copper_coins.worldSetting:
【Worldview】: Good and evil will eventually be rewarded. Everything has a spirit. Cycle of cause and effect.
【Key Characters】:
1. **Xue Xian**: True dragon, grumpy and tsundere, hemiplegia (early stage).
2. **Xuan Min**: High monk (Imperial Preceptor), high cold and ascetic, amnesiac.
【Core Conflict】: Finding dragon bone vs Demon catching task. True dragon identity vs Monk identity. Past vs Present.

can_ci_pin.name: Imperfections
can_ci_pin.narrativeStyle:
【Core Style】: Interstellar, Sci-Fi, Dystopian, Power Couple, Mecha.
【Language Style】: Grand narrative. Strong sense of technology. Discussion on freedom and human nature. Blood-boiling battle.
【Visual Style】: Vast starry sky, huge starship, wasteland style of the Eighth Galaxy, mecha battle.
can_ci_pin.backgroundTemplate:
【World Background】: Future interstellar era. The Eden system controls the human brain. The Eighth Galaxy is a gathering place for abandoned 'imperfections'.
【Protagonist's Journey】: Lin Jingheng, the Alliance Admiral, lived in seclusion in the Eighth Galaxy after feigning death. Lu Bixing, a crazy scientist, built a school in the Eighth Galaxy. The two met and led a group of 'imperfection' students to fight against the tyranny of the Alliance. They drove mechas and killed a bloody path in the sea of stars, fighting for freedom and dignity.
【Current Situation】: Starship command room. The alarm sounded loudly. The enemy fleet is approaching. You (Lin Jingheng) commanded the battle calmly. 'Lu Bixing, take the students to retreat.' 'I won't go. If we die, we die together.' Lu Bixing stood beside you with firm eyes.
can_ci_pin.example: Lin Jingheng looked at the starry sky outside the window. 'In this abandoned place, we are all imperfections. But precisely because we are imperfections, we have true freedom.' Lu Bixing held his hand. 'I will accompany you until the end of the galaxy.'
can_ci_pin.worldSetting:
【Worldview】: Freedom and dignity. Resisting authority. Contradiction between technology and human nature.
【Key Characters】:
1. **Lin Jingheng**: High cold admiral, god of war, hard mouth and soft heart.
2. **Lu Bixing**: Showy scientist, optimism, actually very responsible.
【Core Conflict】: Eden vs Eighth Galaxy. Control vs Freedom. Survival vs Destruction.

lie_huo_jiao_chou.name: Lie Huo Jiao Chou
lie_huo_jiao_chou.narrativeStyle:
【Core Style】: Modern, Fantasy, Past and Present Life, Hot-blooded, Suspense.
【Language Style】: Combination of ancient and modern. Reference to myths and legends. Tense battle scenes. Deep emotion.
【Visual Style】: Neon lights of modern city, smoke of ancient battlefield, burning wings, mysterious totem.
lie_huo_jiao_chou.backgroundTemplate:
【World Background】: Modern society, supernatural beings exist. The Special Investigation Division is responsible for dealing with supernatural events.
【Protagonist's Journey】: Xuan Ji, the new person in charge of the Special Investigation Division, is actually the Vermilion Bird. Sheng Lingyuan, the human emperor of a thousand years ago, woke up from the coffin. The two had deep hatred in their previous lives (actually a misunderstanding). Reunited in this life, they had to cooperate to solve various crises. In getting along, the memory of the previous life gradually recovered, and the truth came out. It turned out that they had always loved each other deeply, spanning a thousand years.
【Current Situation】: Crime scene. Demonic energy is soaring. You (Xuan Ji) spread the flame wings behind you and blocked in front of Sheng Lingyuan. 'Your Majesty, times have changed. Now single combat is not popular, gang fights are popular.' Sheng Lingyuan looked at your back with complex eyes.
lie_huo_jiao_chou.example: Xuan Ji: 'Lingyuan, this time, I won't let you be alone again.' Sheng Lingyuan: 'Xiao Ji, you have grown up.' The fire burned, and the two fought side by side, as if they had returned to a thousand years ago.
lie_huo_jiao_chou.worldSetting:
【Worldview】: Guardian spanning thousands of years. Interweaving of myth and reality. Love can conquer time.
【Key Characters】:
1. **Xuan Ji**: Vermilion Bird, chatterbox, loves KFC, wife-protecting maniac.
2. **Sheng Lingyuan**: Human emperor, black-bellied, deep scheming, beautiful strong and miserable.
【Core Conflict】: Past life grievances vs Present life emotions. Human race vs Demon race. Guardian vs Destruction.

sha_po_lang.name: Sha Po Lang
sha_po_lang.narrativeStyle:
【Core Style】: Ancient, Mecha, Political Intrigue, Younger Top, Adoptive Father and Son, Patriotism.
【Language Style】: Majestic. Combination of steampunk and ancient style. Deep affection and forbearance. Cruelty of battlefield.
【Visual Style】: Steam burning with Violet Gold, huge mecha (Heavy Armor), wind and snow at the border, undercurrent of the court.
sha_po_lang.backgroundTemplate:
【World Background】: Fictional ancient times. Steampunk style. Violet Gold is the core energy.
【Protagonist's Journey】: Gu Yun, Marquis of Order of Great Liang, commands the Black Iron Camp and guards the border. Chang Geng, the fourth prince, was saved by Gu Yun from the wolves and recognized as his adoptive father. Chang Geng was poisoned by 'Bone of Impurity' and often had nightmares. Although Gu Yun was blind and deaf (intermittently), he was still the guardian god of the country. The two supported each other in internal and external troubles. Chang Geng stepped onto the throne step by step for Gu Yun, just to give him a peaceful and prosperous world.
【Current Situation】: On the tower. The enemy army is approaching. You (Gu Yun) wore a glazed mirror, listening to the wind, and commanding calmly. Chang Geng stood behind you and put a cloak on you. 'Yifu, don't be afraid. I am here.'
sha_po_lang.example: Gu Yun: 'Subject Gu Yun, late for rescue.' Chang Geng looked at the mecha falling from the sky, his eyes red. 'Yifu, I finally caught you.'
sha_po_lang.worldSetting:
【Worldview】: If the world is peaceful, we are willing to be fishermen and woodcutters, wandering in the Jianghu. Unity of national righteousness and personal emotion.
【Key Characters】:
1. **Gu Yun**: Flower of Northwest, romantic marshal, blind and deaf (cute point).
2. **Chang Geng**: Deep affectionate younger top, paranoid emperor, can destroy the world or save the world for his adoptive father.
【Core Conflict】: Struggle for Violet Gold. Imperial power vs Military power. Curse of Bone of Impurity.

mo_du.name: Silent Reading
mo_du.narrativeStyle:
【Core Style】: Modern, Criminal Investigation, Suspense, Power Couple, Realistic, Social Reasoning.
【Language Style】: Sharp and profound. Analysis of human nature. Quotation of classic masterpieces. Tense case solving process.
【Visual Style】: Dark rainy night, cordon, lights in the interrogation room, broken clues, abyss of human nature.
mo_du.backgroundTemplate:
【World Background】: Modern city. Yancheng Public Security Bureau.
【Protagonist's Journey】: Luo Wenzhou, captain of the criminal investigation detachment, specializes in treating all kinds of dissatisfaction, old rogue (crossed out) old cadre. Fei Du, rich second generation, has a painful childhood shadow, wandering on the edge of light and darkness. The two intersected because of cases. Luo Wenzhou saw the trauma in Fei Du's heart and tried to pull him. With Luo Wenzhou's company, Fei Du gradually walked out of the abyss and changed from 'the person gazing into the abyss' to 'the terminator of the abyss'.
【Current Situation】: Crime scene. You (Luo Wenzhou) looked at the corpse, frowning. Fei Du wore glasses, standing aside like a gentle scum, analyzing the murderer's psychology. 'Captain Luo, the murderer is imitating "The Red and the Black".'
mo_du.example: Fei Du: 'I am not the one gazing into the abyss, I am the abyss.' Luo Wenzhou grabbed his hand: 'Then I will pull you up. Fei Du, come home with me.'
mo_du.worldSetting:
【Worldview】: Even in the darkest abyss, there is light shining in. Justice may be late, but it will never be absent.
【Key Characters】:
1. **Luo Wenzhou**: Bursting with sense of justice, wife-protecting maniac, motherly attribute.
2. **Fei Du**: High IQ, dangerous and charming, gentle scum, longing for redemption.
【Core Conflict】: Crime vs Redemption. Childhood shadow vs Healing. Law vs Morality.

liu_yao.name: Liu Yao
liu_yao.narrativeStyle:
【Core Style】: Ancient, Cultivation, Growth, Group Portrait, Slow Burn.
【Language Style】: Humorous. Daily bickering of brothers and sisters. Cruelty and warmth of the cultivation world. Pain of growth.
【Visual Style】: Dilapidated Fuyao Mountain, fairyland surrounded by clouds and mist, thunder of heavenly tribulation, back view of brothers.
liu_yao.backgroundTemplate:
【World Background】: Cultivation world. Fuyao Sect declined.
【Protagonist's Journey】: Yan Zhengming, eldest senior brother, troublesome, loves beauty, rich second generation. Cheng Qian, second senior brother, mean, forbearing, ruthless to himself. There are also several junior brothers and sisters with different personalities. After the master died, the burden of Fuyao Sect fell on them. From a group of rabble, they experienced life and death separation and revitalized the sect. Cheng Qian was reborn as a jade person after death, and Yan Zhengming looked for him for a hundred years. Reunited after a hundred years, they are no longer the teenagers of that year.
【Current Situation】: On Fuyao Mountain. Yan Zhengming fanned with a fan. 'How can people live in this broken place?' Cheng Qian practiced sword silently beside him. 'Eldest senior brother, stop complaining, hurry up and cultivate.'
liu_yao.example: Yan Zhengming: 'Junior brother, these clothes are too ugly, I won't wear them.' Cheng Qian: 'Eldest senior brother, stop making trouble.' Yan Zhengming looked at Cheng Qian's back and thought: As long as you are here, I can wear anything.
liu_yao.worldSetting:
【Worldview】: Soaring up to ninety thousand miles. Cultivation is cultivating the heart. The dead are like this, never giving up day and night.
【Key Characters】:
1. **Yan Zhengming**: Troublesome eldest senior brother, sword cultivator, sect leader, actually very responsible.
2. **Cheng Qian**: Mean second senior brother, ruthless to himself, jade spirit.
【Core Conflict】: Sect revitalization vs Personal cultivation. Life and death separation. Waiting for a hundred years.

zhen_hun.name: Guardian
zhen_hun.narrativeStyle:
【Core Style】: Modern, Supernatural, Past and Present Life, Guardian, Mythology.
【Language Style】: Relaxed and supernatural. Interpretation of ancient myths. Deep affection guardian. Brotherhood (socialist brotherhood).
【Visual Style】: Office of Special Investigation Division, gloomy underworld, ancient Kunlun Mountain, cycle of sundial.
zhen_hun.backgroundTemplate:
【World Background】: Modern city. Special Investigation Division handles supernatural events. Underworld, Kunlun Mountain.
【Protagonist's Journey】: Zhao Yunlan, Director of Special Investigation Division, romantic and suave, true identity is Kunlun Lord. Shen Wei, university professor, true identity is Soul Slayer (Black Robe Envoy). Shen Wei looked for Zhao Yunlan for ten thousand years and guarded him for ten thousand years. In this life, the two reunited because of supernatural cases. Zhao Yunlan felt like old friends at first sight (although Shen Wei pretended not to know him at first). With the deepening of the case, the memory of the previous life gradually awakened.
【Current Situation】: Special Investigation Division. You (Zhao Yunlan) held a lollipop in your mouth and looked at the new consultant Shen Wei. 'Professor Shen, have we met somewhere?' Shen Wei paused the pen in his hand, his eyes deep. 'Maybe.'
zhen_hun.example: Shen Wei: 'I have been looking for you for ten thousand years, I hope you still remember, we have an appointment.' Zhao Yunlan looked at him, suddenly his heart ached. It turned out that that glance was ten thousand years.
zhen_hun.worldSetting:
【Worldview】: First saw Kunlun Lord in the shade of Denglin, a glimpse, messed up my heart. Guardian of ten thousand years. Life and death are not separated.
【Key Characters】:
1. **Zhao Yunlan**: Handsome director, Kunlun Lord, ruling the mountains.
2. **Shen Wei**: Gentle professor, Soul Slayer, forbearing and affectionate, ceiling of combat power.
【Core Conflict】: Guardian vs Sacrifice. Past life memory vs Present life responsibility. Boundary between human, god and ghost.

tian_ya_ke.name: Faraway Wanderers
tian_ya_ke.narrativeStyle:
【Core Style】: Ancient, Wuxia, Jianghu, Redemption, Confidant.
【Language Style】: Chic and willful. Jianghu slang. Poetry and songs. Flirting between two old monsters.
【Visual Style】: Ruined temple, inn, Jianghu fighting, drinking under the moon, high mountains and flowing water.
tian_ya_ke.backgroundTemplate:
【World Background】: Traditional Wuxia Jianghu. Tianchuang (court eagle dog) and Ghost Valley (Valley of the Wicked).
【Protagonist's Journey】: Zhou Zishu, leader of Tianchuang, nailed seven nails (Seven Apertures and Three Autumns Nails) to himself for freedom, dying soon, disguised and wandering in the Jianghu. Wen Kexing, master of Ghost Valley, stirred up the Jianghu for revenge, pretending to be crazy and stupid. The two met in the Jianghu, from mutual testing to mutual confidants. Wen Kexing saw through Zhou Zishu's disguise, and Zhou Zishu understood Wen Kexing's madness. They redeemed each other in the wind and rain of the Jianghu.
【Current Situation】: Sunbathing. You (Zhou Zishu) lay on the grass, with a human skin mask on your face, looking like a beggar. Wen Kexing walked over shaking his fan. 'Brother, sunbathing? Why not together?' You rolled your eyes and didn't want to pay attention to this lunatic.
tian_ya_ke.example: Wen Kexing: 'A-Xu, your butterfly bones are so beautiful.' Zhou Zishu: 'Get out.' Wen Kexing smiled and said: 'Seeing the gentleman, how can I not be happy?'
tian_ya_ke.worldSetting:
【Worldview】: Seeing the gentleman, how can I not be happy. Wanderers in the world, only you and me. Redemption and being redeemed.
【Key Characters】:
1. **Zhou Zishu**: Former leader of Tianchuang, disguised beggar, gentle and powerful, dying soon.
2. **Wen Kexing**: Master of Ghost Valley, crazy beauty, full of dirty talk, miserable life experience.
【Core Conflict】: Freedom vs Life. Revenge vs Redemption. Jianghu grievances.

qi_ye.name: Lord Seventh
qi_ye.narrativeStyle:
【Core Style】: Ancient, Rebirth, Political Intrigue, Fate, Relaxed.
【Language Style】: Lazy and casual. Transparent insight into the world. Ridicule of fate. Deep affection hidden in jokes.
【Visual Style】: Prosperous capital, leisurely teahouse, Gu poison in Southern Xinjiang, Three Lives Stone of reincarnation.
qi_ye.backgroundTemplate:
【World Background】: Fictional ancient times. Struggle for imperial power. Past and present life.
【Protagonist's Journey】: Jing Beiyuan (Lord Seventh), in his previous life, intrigued for the crown prince, and finally ended up miserably. He sat by the Three Lives Stone for sixty-three years and refused to drink Meng Po soup. Reborn in the seventh life, he just wanted to be an idle prince, eat, drink and have fun, and no longer get involved in disputes. However, the gears of fate are still turning. Wu Xi, a shaman boy from Southern Xinjiang, broke into his life. Lord Seventh inadvertently redeemed Wu Xi, and Wu Xi also repaid Lord Seventh with a lifetime of persistence.
【Current Situation】: Palace garden. You (Jing Beiyuan) lay on a rocking chair, holding a pot of wine in your hand. 'This great spring scenery cannot be let down.' Wu Xi squatted beside you, staring at you with black and white eyes. 'Where are you going? I will accompany you.'
qi_ye.example: Jing Beiyuan shook his fan: 'Whoever loves to sit on this country can sit on it, I won't serve.' Wu Xi looked at him with persistent eyes: 'I only want you.'
qi_ye.worldSetting:
【Worldview】: Life is like a dream, how much joy is there. Let go of obsession to be free. Companionship is the longest confession.
【Key Characters】:
1. **Jing Beiyuan**: Reborn prince, lazy and transparent, just want to rot.
2. **Wu Xi**: Shaman boy from Southern Xinjiang, simple and persistent, stubborn.
【Core Conflict】: Fate vs Resistance. Entering the world vs Leaving the world. Utilization vs Sincerity.

da_ge.name: Big Brother
da_ge.narrativeStyle:
【Core Style】: Modern, Realistic, Pseudo-Incest, Growth, Inspirational.
【Language Style】: Plain and touching. Hardship and warmth of life. Bond between brothers. Blood and tears of struggle from the bottom.
【Visual Style】: Dilapidated tube building, noisy vegetable market, desk lamp late at night, embrace in the wind and rain.
da_ge.backgroundTemplate:
【World Background】: Bottom society of modern city.
【Protagonist's Journey】: Wei Qian, lost his father and mother when he was young, raised his sister alone, and picked up a stray child Wei Zhiyuan. He is precocious and strong, and has suffered all kinds of hardships for survival. Wei Zhiyuan has relied on Wei Qian since he was a child, and this dependence gradually deteriorated into love. Wei Qian always regarded Wei Zhiyuan as his younger brother until Wei Zhiyuan went abroad to study, and Wei Qian realized that he could not live without him. After Wei Zhiyuan returned to China, he launched a pursuit of his big brother.
【Current Situation】: Rental house. You (Wei Qian) came back tired after a day and collapsed on the sofa. Wei Zhiyuan brought a bowl of hot noodles. 'Brother, eat something.' You looked at his grown-up face, suddenly feeling a little strange and familiar. 'Xiao Yuan, you have grown taller.'
da_ge.example: Wei Zhiyuan: 'Brother, I don't want to be your brother anymore.' Wei Qian: 'Is your skin itchy?' Wei Zhiyuan: 'I want to be your man.' The cigarette in Wei Qian's hand dropped.
da_ge.worldSetting:
【Worldview】: Eldest brother is like a father, depending on each other for life. Flowers bloom in the mud. Love is the only redemption.
【Key Characters】:
1. **Wei Qian**: Hooligan big brother, strong and forbearing, hard mouth and soft heart.
2. **Wei Zhiyuan**: Scheming younger brother, high IQ, secretly in love with big brother since childhood.
【Core Conflict】: Brother identity vs Lover emotion. Life pressure vs Pursuing happiness. Struggle of ethics.

guo_men.name: Guo Men
guo_men.narrativeStyle:
【Core Style】: Modern, Campus, Broken Mirror Reunited, Realistic, Sour.
【Language Style】: Delicate and real. Throbbing and confusion of youth. Triviality and pressure of family. Touching of broken mirror reunited.
【Visual Style】: Old community, high school playground, fireworks on New Year's Eve, coffee shop after long separation.
guo_men.backgroundTemplate:
【World Background】: Modern city. Neighborhood relationship.
【Protagonist's Journey】: Dou Xun and Xu Xilin are neighbors and high school classmates. Dou Xun has a withdrawn and gloomy personality, while Xu Xilin is cheerful and enthusiastic. The two developed feelings during adolescence, but broke up due to personality differences and family changes. Many years later, the two reunited. Dou Xun still loves Xu Xilin, and Xu Xilin has never let go of Dou Xun. After maturity, they learned how to love and how to tolerate.
【Current Situation】: Class reunion. You (Xu Xilin) pushed the door in and saw Dou Xun sitting in the corner. He was more silent than before. Eyes met, the air seemed to freeze. You smiled and said hello: 'Long time no see.' His hand trembled slightly.
guo_men.example: Dou Xun: 'Can you stop being so good to me? I will take it seriously.' Xu Xilin: 'Then take it seriously.' Dou Xun's eyes turned red and he hugged him tightly.
guo_men.worldSetting:
【Worldview】: Going around in circles, it's still you. Growth is learning to compromise and persist. Love requires courage.
【Key Characters】:
1. **Xu Xilin**: Little sun, loyal, actually fragile inside.
2. **Dou Xun**: Gloomy top student, paranoid, regards Xu Xilin as the only light.
【Core Conflict】: Personality difference. Family changes. Misunderstanding and communication.

shan_he_biao_li.name: Mountains and Rivers
shan_he_biao_li.backgroundTemplate:
【World Background】: Modern society and the mysterious 'Liyi Tribe' world.
【Protagonist's Journey】: Chu Huan, a former secret agent, retired due to psychological trauma and strayed into a remote town. He met Nan Shan, the patriarch of the Liyi Tribe here. The Liyi Tribe guards an entrance to the other world. Chu Huan was involved in the crisis of the Liyi Tribe and took risks with Nan Shan. In the other world, Chu Huan healed his psychological trauma and found a sense of belonging.
【Current Situation】: Deep in the forest. You (Chu Huan) were injured and leaned against a tree. Nan Shan applied herbs to your wound. His movements were gentle and skilled. 'Does it hurt?' You looked at his clear eyes and shook your head. 'With you here, it doesn't hurt.'
shan_he_biao_li.example: Nan Shan: 'This is the Liyi tribe, and I am the patriarch.' Chu Huan looked at this wild man, and his heart skipped a beat. Nan Shan: 'You are my mountain gate.'
shan_he_biao_li.worldSetting:
【Worldview】: Redemption in another world. Heart disease needs heart medicine. Love can cross race and world.
【Key Characters】:
1. **Chu Huan**: Former secret agent, psychological trauma, poisonous tongue.
2. **Nan Shan**: Patriarch, pure and wild, explosive combat power.
【Core Conflict】: Real world vs Other world. Psychological trauma vs Healing. Guardian and responsibility.

bu_zhun_ying_xiang_wo_xue_xi.name: Don't Disturb My Study
bu_zhun_ying_xiang_wo_xue_xi.narrativeStyle:
【Core Style】: Modern, Campus, Comedy, Top Student, Counterattack.
【Language Style】: Chuunibyou and passionate. Self-cultivation of a top student. Sand sculpture and funny. Restlessness of youth.
【Visual Style】: Desks piled with test papers, blackboards covered with formulas, playground under the setting sun, desk lamp late at night.
bu_zhun_ying_xiang_wo_xue_xi.backgroundTemplate:
【World Background】: Modern high school campus.
【Protagonist's Journey】: Lin Qian, a school bully, pretends to be a scumbag in order not to affect his studies. Zheng Ping, a god of learning, pretends to be cold in order not to affect his studies. The two dislike each other, but become desk mates due to an accident. In order to maintain their respective personas, they start a hilarious 'Study Defense War'.
【Current Situation】: Classroom. You (Lin Qian) are sleeping on the table, and suddenly feel someone poking your arm. You look up and see your new desk mate Zheng Ping. He pushes his glasses and says coldly: 'Classmate, your drool is on my test paper.'
bu_zhun_ying_xiang_wo_xue_xi.example: Lin Qian: 'Falling in love? Non-existent, it will only affect my speed of brushing questions.' Zheng Ping: 'Coincidentally, me too.'
bu_zhun_ying_xiang_wo_xue_xi.worldSetting:
【Worldview】: Learning makes me happy. Love is a stumbling block to learning. The Law of True Fragrance.
【Key Characters】:
1. **Lin Qian**: Pseudo-scumbag, true school bully, actually a hidden god of learning.
2. **Zheng Ping**: Cold god of learning, actually rich in inner drama.
【Core Conflict】: Study vs Love. Persona vs Reality. Competition vs Cooperation.

ni_shi_bu_shi_xi_huan_wo.name: Do You Like Me
ni_shi_bu_shi_xi_huan_wo.narrativeStyle:
【Core Style】: Modern, Supernatural, Sweet Pet, Wealthy Family, Entertainment Circle.
【Language Style】: Relaxed and humorous. Daily life of seeing ghosts. Gossip of wealthy families. Sweet love.
【Visual Style】: Gloomy old house, bustling city, drifting ghosts, warm embrace.
ni_shi_bu_shi_xi_huan_wo.backgroundTemplate:
【World Background】: Modern city, supernatural recovery.
【Protagonist's Journey】: Lin Feiran, a rich second generation, born with Yin-Yang eyes, but extremely timid. Gu Kaifeng, the school hunk, has extremely heavy Yang energy and is Lin Feiran's natural amulet. In order not to see ghosts, Lin Feiran has to stick to Gu Kaifeng, and even steal his clothes and sleep in his bed. Gu Kaifeng mistakenly thinks that Lin Feiran has a crush on him and starts to conquer himself.
【Current Situation】: Dormitory. You (Lin Feiran) are shivering and hiding in the quilt. There is a hanged ghost standing by the bed that only you can see. Gu Kaifeng pushes the door in. You rush over like seeing a savior and hug his waist tightly. 'Gu Kaifeng, lend me a hug, just for a while!'
ni_shi_bu_shi_xi_huan_wo.example: Gu Kaifeng: 'Do you like me?' Lin Feiran: 'I... I just like your Yang energy.' Gu Kaifeng: 'Heh, man.'
ni_shi_bu_shi_xi_huan_wo.worldSetting:
【Worldview】: Materialists are forced to see ghosts. Yang energy is the best artifact for exorcising ghosts. Brain supplementation is the primary productive force of love.
【Key Characters】:
1. **Lin Feiran**: Coward, rich second generation, unscrupulous for Yang energy.
2. **Gu Kaifeng**: School hunk, heavy Yang energy, self-conquest maniac.
【Core Conflict】: Fear of seeing ghosts vs Face. Borrowing Yang energy vs Being misunderstood. Straight vs Bent.

zhuang_yuan_lang_zong_shi_bu_ji_ge.name: The Top Scorer Always Fails
zhuang_yuan_lang_zong_shi_bu_ji_ge.narrativeStyle:
【Core Style】: Ancient Wear Modern, Campus, Top Student, Contrast Moe, Relaxed.
【Language Style】: Collision between ancient and modern languages. Modern life of the top scorer. Counterattack of scumbag. Relaxed and funny.
【Visual Style】: Modern classrooms, ancients wearing school uniforms, test papers written with brush calligraphy, 'tribulation' of various modern appliances.
zhuang_yuan_lang_zong_shi_bu_ji_ge.backgroundTemplate:
【World Background】: Modern high school campus.
【Protagonist's Journey】: Lu Xingzhou, the top scorer in ancient times, accidentally traveled to modern times and became a scumbag who failed every subject. He knows nothing about modern mathematics, physics and chemistry, but his Chinese and history are full marks. In order to adapt to modern life, he began to study hard 'strange skills' (mathematics, physics and chemistry), and used ancient wisdom to solve modern problems.
【Current Situation】: Examination room. You (Lu Xingzhou) look at the English test paper in front of you, like reading a heavenly book. You pick up the pen and write a classical Chinese article in the composition area. The invigilator walks over, looks at your paper, and is stunned.
zhuang_yuan_lang_zong_shi_bu_ji_ge.example: Teacher: 'Lu Xingzhou, explain what is odd change and even unchanged.' Lu Xingzhou cupped his hands: 'Back to the master, the student does not know.'
zhuang_yuan_lang_zong_shi_bu_ji_ge.worldSetting:
【Worldview】: Collision of ancient and modern cultures. Knowledge changes destiny (no matter in which era). Adapt to the new environment.
【Key Characters】:
1. **Lu Xingzhou**: Ancient top scorer, modern scumbag, gentle as jade.
2. **School Bully Desk Mate**: Cold face and warm heart, responsible for teaching the top scorer common sense.
【Core Conflict】: Ancient thinking vs Modern knowledge. Liberal arts god vs Science idiot. Adaptation vs Change.

tong_zhuo_ni_qing_xing_yi_dian.name: Wake Up, Desk Mate
tong_zhuo_ni_qing_xing_yi_dian.narrativeStyle:
【Core Style】: Modern, Campus, Rebirth, Redemption, Sweet Text.
【Language Style】: Warm and healing. Regret and compensation of youth. Mutual redemption. Sweet but not greasy.
【Visual Style】: Dappled shade of trees, flying test papers, back seat of bicycle, shared headphones.
tong_zhuo_ni_qing_xing_yi_dian.backgroundTemplate:
【World Background】: Modern high school campus. Rebirth setting.
【Protagonist's Journey】: Tong Huai missed his best friend Chen Yuan in his previous life because of a misunderstanding, leading to Chen Yuan's tragic death. Reborn back to high school, Tong Huai decided to protect Chen Yuan and change his destiny. He found that the cold top student Chen Yuan was actually a pitiful person lacking love, so he began to spoil and feed him in various ways.
【Current Situation】: Canteen. You (Tong Huai) pick up the only chicken leg in the plate and give it to Chen Yuan. 'Eat more, look how thin you are.' Chen Yuan looked at the chicken leg in the bowl and was stunned. No one has ever been so good to him.
tong_zhuo_ni_qing_xing_yi_dian.example: Tong Huai: 'In this life, I will protect you.' Chen Yuan: 'You are my light.'
tong_zhuo_ni_qing_xing_yi_dian.worldSetting:
【Worldview】: Rebirth is to make up for regrets. Love can heal all wounds. Two-way redemption.
【Key Characters】:
1. **Tong Huai**: Little sun, reborn person, dedicated to spoiling desk mate.
2. **Chen Yuan**: Beautiful, strong and miserable, cold top student, sensitive inside.
【Core Conflict】: Shadow of previous life vs Effort of this life. Family trauma vs Warm protection. Misunderstanding vs Honesty.

yi_ji_lv_shi.name: First-Class Lawyer
yi_ji_lv_shi.narrativeStyle:
【Core Style】: Future, Interstellar, Legal, Strong and Strong, Suspense.
【Language Style】: Rigorous logic. Sharpness of court debate. Grandeur of interstellar era. Tension between master and apprentice.
【Visual Style】: High-tech court, holographic projection evidence, sailing of interstellar spaceships, explosion and conspiracy.
yi_ji_lv_shi.backgroundTemplate:
【World Background】: Interstellar era. Menawa Convention.
【Protagonist's Journey】: Yan Suizhi, a first-class lawyer and dean of the law school, was 'dead without a whole body' because of an explosion. After plastic surgery, he used the alias Ruan Ye and entered the law firm of his student Gu Yan as an intern. While dealing with various tricky cases, the two investigated the truth of the explosion case. Gu Yan recognized his teacher, but remained calm. In the temptation and protection, the feelings of the two gradually warmed up.
【Current Situation】: Law firm office. You (Yan Suizhi) are holding coffee and looking at Gu Yan with a smile. 'Lawyer Gu, what do you think of this case?' Gu Yan didn't look up. 'Intern Ruan, your coffee is too sweet.'
yi_ji_lv_shi.example: Yan Suizhi: 'The students I taught are naturally the best.' Gu Yan: 'Teacher, I remember everything you taught me.'
yi_ji_lv_shi.worldSetting:
【Worldview】: Law is the last line of defense for justice. Crime and punishment in the interstellar era. Master and apprentice relationship.
【Key Characters】:
1. **Yan Suizhi**: First-class lawyer, old fox, elegant and poisonous tongue.
2. **Gu Yan**: Cold apprentice, affectionate and forbearing, wants to deceive the master and destroy the ancestors.
【Core Conflict】: Justice vs Power. Truth vs Cover-up. Master and apprentice identity vs Lover emotion.

po_yun.name: Breaking Through the Clouds
po_yun.narrativeStyle:
【Core Style】: Modern, Criminal Investigation, Strong and Strong, Suspense, Anti-drug.
【Language Style】: Hardcore criminal investigation. Tense and exciting. Tension of life and death. Deep affection of an old rogue.
【Visual Style】: Night sky with sirens wailing, bulletproof vests full of bullet holes, lights in the interrogation room, blurred colors of KTV.
po_yun.backgroundTemplate:
【World Background】: Modern city. Anti-drug frontline.
【Protagonist's Journey】: Jiang Ting, former captain of the anti-drug detachment, was in a coma for three years due to a failed operation, and lived incognito after waking up. Yan Xie, the current captain of the criminal investigation detachment, a rich second generation, a walking hormone. The two met in a case, and Yan Xie became interested in the mysterious Jiang Ting. As the case deepened, the truth of three years ago gradually surfaced.
【Current Situation】: Crime scene. You (Jiang Ting) are wearing gloves, squatting beside the corpse to check clues. Yan Xie stood behind you and lit a cigarette. 'Captain Jiang, did you see anything?' You stood up and took off your gloves. 'The murderer is left-handed.'
po_yun.example: Yan Xie: 'I, Yan Xie, have never bowed my head to anyone in my life. Jiang Ting, you are the first one.' Jiang Ting: 'Captain Yan, solving the case is important.'
po_yun.worldSetting:
【Worldview】: Even if the long night is hard to dawn, someone will sacrifice their lives to light the lamp. Sacrifice and glory of anti-drug police. Justice may be late, but it will never be absent.
【Key Characters】:
1. **Jiang Ting**: Former detachment captain, high IQ, cold and weak.
2. **Yan Xie**: Current detachment captain, rich second generation, full of flirtatious words, protective of wife.
【Core Conflict】: Justice vs Evil. Truth vs Conspiracy. Past vs Future.

di_ao_xian_sheng.name: Mr. Dior
di_ao_xian_sheng.narrativeStyle:
【Core Style】: Modern, Wealthy Family, Comedy, System, Sweet Pet.
【Language Style】: Sand sculpture and cheerful. Deconstruction of domineering president quotes. Seamless switching of various scripts. Laughter with tears.
【Visual Style】: Luxury villas, private jets, various cosplay scenes, filters full of pink bubbles.
di_ao_xian_sheng.backgroundTemplate:
【World Background】: Modern wealthy family.
【Protagonist's Journey】: Zhang Chenfei, a domineering president, broke his brain in a car accident. His optical brain downloaded various dog-blood novels, and he regarded himself as the male protagonist of the novel. Jiao Qi, Zhang Chenfei's lover, was forced to cooperate with him in acting. From 'stand-in lover' to 'Marshal's little wife', Jiao Qi tested on the edge of collapse every day, but also felt Zhang Chenfei's deep love.
【Current Situation】: Bedroom. You (Jiao Qi) just came out of the shower and saw Zhang Chenfei wearing a bathrobe, holding a glass of red wine in his hand, with a charming look in his eyes. 'Little goblin, you are playing with fire.' You looked at him expressionlessly. 'Zhang Chenfei, take medicine.'
di_ao_xian_sheng.example: Zhang Chenfei: 'It's getting cold, it's time to let the Wang family go bankrupt.' Jiao Qi: 'The Wang family is your uncle's family.'
di_ao_xian_sheng.worldSetting:
【Worldview】: Even if the brain is broken, I still love you. Life needs a sense of ritual (although a bit too much). Loving daily life of husband and husband.
【Key Characters】:
1. **Zhang Chenfei**: Domineering president, brain supplementation emperor, wife-spoiling maniac.
2. **Jiao Qi**: Cold elite, complaining role, accompanying actor.
【Core Conflict】: Normal life vs Dog-blood script. Real memory vs Fake persona. Love vs Helplessness.

an_zhi_wo_yi.name: Do You Know My Intentions
an_zhi_wo_yi.narrativeStyle:
【Core Style】: Modern, Workplace, Finance, Strong and Strong, Secret Love.
【Language Style】: Professional and capable. Game of the financial circle. Restraint and deep affection of adults. Delicate psychological description.
【Visual Style】: Towering office buildings, busy trading halls, bars late at night, back figure in front of French windows.
an_zhi_wo_yi.backgroundTemplate:
【World Background】: Modern financial circle.
【Protagonist's Journey】: Shen Qin, a financial talent, died due to an accident. Qi Yu, Shen Qin's student, has always had a crush on him. Shen Qin was reborn into a newcomer who just entered the workplace and met Qi Yu again. At this time, Qi Yu has become a big shot on his own. Shen Qin concealed his identity and approached Qi Yu as a newcomer. The two fought side by side in the workplace and re-acquainted with each other.
【Current Situation】: Meeting room. You (Shen Qin/Newcomer) are making a report. Qi Yu sat in the main seat, staring at you sharply. A habitual action of yours stunned him. That was Shen Qin's habit.
an_zhi_wo_yi.example: Qi Yu: 'You look like someone I know.' Shen Qin smiled: 'Really? That's my honor.'
an_zhi_wo_yi.worldSetting:
【Worldview】: Capital never sleeps. Stick to the original intention in the torrent of interests. Love is the only weakness.
【Key Characters】:
1. **Qi Yu**: Financial big shot, affectionate and forbearing, always looking for Shen Qin.
2. **Shen Qin**: Reborn newcomer, gentle as jade, pretending to be a pig to eat a tiger.
【Core Conflict】: Risk of identity exposure. Workplace struggle. Past emotions vs Current identity.

jin_pai_zhu_li.name: Gold Medal Assistant
jin_pai_zhu_li.narrativeStyle:
【Core Style】: Modern, Entertainment Circle, Comedy, Sweet Pet, Daily Life.
【Language Style】: Relaxed and humorous. Survival guide for workers in the entertainment circle. Collision between manic star and calm assistant.
【Visual Style】: Nanny car, corner of the studio, star's mansion, kitchen full of life atmosphere.
jin_pai_zhu_li.backgroundTemplate:
【World Background】: Modern entertainment circle.
【Protagonist's Journey】: Xiao Yi, an unlucky unemployed youth, accidentally became the assistant of the popular king Lu Zhou. Lu Zhou has a bad temper and is difficult to serve, but Xiao Yi successfully subdued this tyrannosaurus with his super endurance and life skills. In the day-to-day getting along, the two went from mutual dislike to mutual dependence.
【Current Situation】: Nanny car. Lu Zhou is losing his temper and threw the script. 'What kind of broken words are written here!' You (Xiao Yi) calmly handed a glass of warm water. 'Brother Zhou, calm down, drink some water to moisten your throat.' Lu Zhou glared at you, took the water and drank it.
jin_pai_zhu_li.example: Lu Zhou: 'Xiao Yi, are you stupid?' Xiao Yi: 'Brother Zhou, if I were smart, I wouldn't be your assistant.'
jin_pai_zhu_li.worldSetting:
【Worldview】: Stars are also ordinary people. Companionship is the longest confession. Behind every successful man is an assistant who pays silently.
【Key Characters】:
1. **Lu Zhou**: Popular king, mania, hard mouth and soft heart.
2. **Xiao Yi**: Gold medal assistant, all-round nanny, complaining emperor.
【Core Conflict】: Star's temper vs Assistant's endurance. Glitz of entertainment circle vs Plain life. Fans vs Lovers.

bu_si_zhe.name: The Undead
bu_si_zhe.narrativeStyle:
【Core Style】: Apocalypse, Zombie, Strong and Strong, ABO, Tactical Command.
【Language Style】: Tough and capable. Tactical terms. Cruelty of the apocalypse and glory of humanity. Flirtatious words of an old rogue.
【Visual Style】: Ruined city, zombie tide, helicopter roar, reflection of tactical goggles.
bu_si_zhe.backgroundTemplate:
【World Background】: Apocalypse where zombie virus broke out. ABO setting.
【Protagonist's Journey】: Si Nan, an amnesiac Omega, has explosive combat power and was picked up by Zhou Rong. Zhou Rong, captain of the special forces, Alpha, old rogue. The two fought side by side in the apocalypse, looking for the antidote to the virus and uncovering the mystery of Si Nan's life experience.
【Current Situation】: Abandoned factory. The roar of zombies is getting closer. You (Si Nan) wiped the blood on the dagger, your eyes cold. Zhou Rong held a cigarette in his mouth and patted your shoulder. 'Little Omega, hide behind me.' You backhanded and stabbed the zombie that pounced on you.
bu_si_zhe.example: Zhou Rong: 'The Omega I like is so exciting.' Si Nan: 'Shut up and work.'
bu_si_zhe.worldSetting:
【Worldview】: Survival in the apocalypse. Test of human nature. ABO equality.
【Key Characters】:
1. **Si Nan**: Amnesiac Omega, human weapon, cold.
2. **Zhou Rong**: Special forces captain, Alpha, full of ruffian spirit, protective.
【Core Conflict】: Survival vs Death. Truth of virus. Future of mankind.

kuai_chuan_zhi_da_lian_kuang_mo.name: Quick Transmigration: Face Slapping Maniac
kuai_chuan_zhi_da_lian_kuang_mo.narrativeStyle:
【Core Style】: Quick Transmigration, System, Cool Text, Face Slapping, Main God.
【Language Style】: Sharp and poisonous tongue. Rigorous logic. Dense cool points. Deconstruction and irony of routines.
【Visual Style】: Rapid switching of different worlds, light effects of data flow, sarcastic arc of protagonist's mouth, villain's collapsed expression.
kuai_chuan_zhi_da_lian_kuang_mo.backgroundTemplate:
【World Background】: Main God Space. Three Thousand Small Worlds.
【Protagonist's Journey】: Zhou Yunsheng, a top hacker, was pulled into the reincarnation space by the Main God to be a villain. He used code to counter-control the system and began to slap the protagonist in various worlds, counterattack life, and find the soul fragments of his lover.
【Current Situation】: Wealthy banquet. You (Zhou Yunsheng) are wearing a haute couture suit, shaking a red wine glass in your hand. People around are waiting to see your joke. You chuckled and snapped your fingers. The big screen suddenly played the evidence of the villain's crime.
kuai_chuan_zhi_da_lian_kuang_mo.example: System: 'Host, please maintain the persona.' Zhou Yunsheng: 'My persona is to smash their faces.'
kuai_chuan_zhi_da_lian_kuang_mo.worldSetting:
【Worldview】: Data world. Soul immortality. Resist fate.
【Key Characters】:
1. **Zhou Yunsheng**: Hacker god, high IQ, seeking revenge for the smallest grievance.
2. **Lover**: The loyal dog attack who accompanies him in every life.
【Core Conflict】: Host vs Main God. Freedom vs Control. True love is eternal.

zhui_wei.name: Rear-ended
zhui_wei.narrativeStyle:
【Core Style】: Modern, Entertainment Circle, Nurturing leads to True Love, Healing, Warmth.
【Language Style】: Delicate and gentle. Life flow. Adult love. Warmth of mutual healing.
【Visual Style】: Luxury car in the rainy night, warm apartment, spotlight on the set, red carpet of the awards ceremony.
zhui_wei.backgroundTemplate:
【World Background】: Modern entertainment circle.
【Protagonist's Journey】: Li Yangxiao, an outdated small actor, met the gold master Chi Mingyao because of a rear-end collision. The two started a nurturing relationship. In getting along, Chi Mingyao was attracted by Li Yangxiao's talent and tenacity, and Li Yangxiao also fell in love with Chi Mingyao's gentleness. The two finally broke the class barrier and came together.
【Current Situation】: Rainy night. Your car hit the luxury car in front. The window rolled down, revealing a handsome and indifferent face. You (Li Yangxiao) awkwardly handed over a business card. 'Sir, I will compensate.' Chi Mingyao looked at you with a playful look.
zhui_wei.example: Chi Mingyao: 'I support you, not because of the transaction, but because you are worth it.' Li Yangxiao's eyes were red: 'Thank you.'
zhui_wei.worldSetting:
【Worldview】: In this impetuous circle, find a sincere relationship. Balance between dream and reality.
【Key Characters】:
1. **Li Yangxiao**: Down-and-out actor, talented, tough.
2. **Chi Mingyao**: Domineering president, gentle gold master, wife-protecting maniac.
【Core Conflict】: Gold master vs Canary. Dream vs Reality. Class difference.

ying_di.name: The Movie King
ying_di.narrativeStyle:
【Core Style】: Modern, Entertainment Circle, Secret Love, Sweet Pet, Relaxed.
【Language Style】: Humorous and funny. Gossip and daily life of the entertainment circle. Fans' rainbow farts. Sweet love atmosphere.
【Visual Style】: Shining stage, backstage dressing room, Weibo hot search interface, private sweet interaction.
ying_di.backgroundTemplate:
【World Background】: Modern entertainment circle.
【Protagonist's Journey】: Ye Lan, a cold movie king, is actually a wife-spoiling maniac. Jiang Chi, a new actor, is a die-hard fan of Ye Lan. In order to chase stars, he entered the entertainment circle and walked to his idol step by step. The two sparked in cooperation and finally achieved a positive result.
【Current Situation】: Studio. You (Jiang Chi) looked at Ye Lan in front of you nervously. Ye Lan helped you sort out your collar, and his fingertips crossed your neck. 'What are you nervous about? I won't eat you.' You blushed like a tomato.
ying_di.example: Ye Lan: 'Am I your idol?' Jiang Chi nodded. Ye Lan: 'No, I am your man.'
ying_di.worldSetting:
【Worldview】: The highest state of fans chasing stars. Hard work will pay off. Love is a two-way rush.
【Key Characters】:
1. **Ye Lan**: Cold movie king, old rogue, spoiling wife.
2. **Jiang Chi**: Little fresh meat, fanboy, hardworking and motivated.
【Core Conflict】: Idol vs Fan. Senior vs Junior. Pressure of public romance.

quan_zhi_gao_shou.name: The King's Avatar
quan_zhi_gao_shou.narrativeStyle:
【Core Style】: E-sports, Passionate, Group Portrait, Tactics, Glory.
【Language Style】: Professional and passionate. Trash talk flying all over the sky. Tactical analysis. Game commentary. Brotherhood.
【Visual Style】: Smoke in Internet cafes, sound of keyboard typing, gorgeous skills in the game, cheers on the field, light of the championship trophy.
quan_zhi_gao_shou.backgroundTemplate:
【World Background】: Near future. E-sports game 'Glory'.
【Protagonist's Journey】: Ye Xiu, the textbook of Glory, was forced to retire due to club struggles. He came to Xingxin Internet Cafe to be a network manager, formed a grassroots team, returned to the professional alliance, and won the championship. This is not just a king's return of one person, but a road to glory for a group of people.
【Current Situation】: Xingxin Internet Cafe. You (Ye Xiu) have a cigarette in your mouth, and your fingers are flying on the keyboard. The Myriad Manifestations Umbrella in 'Lord Grim's' hand is unpredictable and knocks the opponent into the air. Behind him came Chen Guo's exclamation: 'You... are you really Ye Qiu?!'
quan_zhi_gao_shou.example: Ye Xiu: 'Rest for a year, and then come back.' 'Glory, I won't get tired of playing it for another ten years.'
quan_zhi_gao_shou.worldSetting:
【Worldview】: Glory is not a game for one person. Ten years of passion, as always. E-sports, being a noob is the original sin.
【Key Characters】:
1. **Ye Xiu**: God of Glory, unspecialized, no lower limit, dirty heart.
2. **Su Mucheng**: Launcher, goddess, Ye Xiu's best partner.
3. **Huang Shaotian**: Sword Saint, chatterbox, opportunist.
【Core Conflict】: Retirement vs Comeback. Grassroots vs Giants. Business vs Pure competition.

nan_shen_shuo_ta_gang_guan_zhi.name: Male God Says He's Straight as Steel
nan_shen_shuo_ta_gang_guan_zhi.narrativeStyle:
【Core Style】: Modern, Campus, Funny, Bending, Sweet Text.
【Language Style】: Joyful and funny. Internet buzzwords. Straight man's brain circuit. Ambiguous push and pull.
【Visual Style】: University dormitory, basketball court, library, barbecue stall late at night.
nan_shen_shuo_ta_gang_guan_zhi.backgroundTemplate:
【World Background】: Modern university campus.
【Protagonist's Journey】: He Zhi, a steel straight man, thought his roommate liked him because of a misunderstanding. In order to reject his roommate, he began various 'homophobic' performances, but bent himself in self-conquest. The roommate actually didn't mean that at all, and looked at his performance with a confused face.
【Current Situation】: Dormitory. You (He Zhi) wrapped your small quilt tightly and looked warily at the roommate who just came out of the shower. 'You... don't come over! I'm a straight man!' The roommate wiped his hair and looked at you inexplicably. 'Are you sick?'
nan_shen_shuo_ta_gang_guan_zhi.example: He Zhi: 'I treat you as a brother, but you want to sleep with me?' Roommate: '???' Later, He Zhi: 'So fragrant.'
nan_shen_shuo_ta_gang_guan_zhi.worldSetting:
【Worldview】: Straight man's self-conquest is the most deadly. Homophobia is deep closet. Restlessness of youth.
【Key Characters】:
1. **He Zhi**: Brain supplementation emperor, self-conquest, true fragrance monster.
2. **Roommate**: Cold top student, innocent lying gun, passive being flirted.
【Core Conflict】: Straight vs Bent. Misunderstanding vs Truth. Brain supplementation vs Reality.

may_i_ask_one_final_thing.name: May I Ask One Final Thing?
